how_to_use: Apply directly to the lips.
description:
A lip gloss.

Enter your gloss boss era with the MAC Cosmetics Lipglass. Offering a sheer veil of shine, this unique gloss is the perfect tool for achieving a high-gloss finish or a subtle, shimmery sheen. With a powerfully pigmented, super shiny formula that harnesses the conditioning power of jojoba oil to soften and condition the lips, this gloss gives you a glass-like shine that lasts whether it’s worn on its own, over lip pencil or lipstick.

how_to_use: Using the applicator provided, line, and fill the lips towards the centre.
description:
A liquid lipstick.

Get your lips locked and loaded with the MAC Cosmetics Locked Kiss Ink Lipcolour. This ultra-pigmented liquid lipstick uses Pigment Lock Technology to lock in 24-hours of full-coverage, rich matte colour into the lips without the risk of bleeding or feathering. Formulated with passion fruit oil, coconut oil, and shea butter, the lipstick nourishes the lips to leave them soft, moisturised, and kiss-ready. Let’s get lippy!

- Cruelty free
- Pigment Lock Technology

how_to_use: Buff into the skin with a brush, work in with the fingers or grab your blending sponge and tap in.Build to create that second-skin effect.
description:
A serum-infused foundation. 

After that soft-focus, airbrushed complexion? Haul Makeup Revolution’s Skin Silk Serum Foundation. Formulated with hydrating hyaluronic acid and plumping peptides, this skincare-powered foundation helps blur imperfections with a weightless feel and a radiant, satin finish. Offering light-to-medium coverage, this breathable foundation applies effortlessly and can be built up for an undetectable, your-skin-but-better effect.

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

description:
A nude lip liner. 

Line and define your lips with the Freck Beauty Makeout Club Nude Muse Lip Liner. Non-drying and packed with pigment, this nourishing lip liner smoothly glides along the lips without skipping or tugging to amplify and define the lips, whilst locking in moisture. Formulated with a blend of jojoba oil and emollients, this long-wearing lip liner mimics the performance of silicone to hold your lip looks in place with an easy application. Warning: you’re about to be obsessed. 

- Free of gluten and fragrance

raw_description:
A nude lip liner.

Line and define your lips with the Freck Beauty Makeout Club Nude Muse Lip Liner. Non-drying and packed with pigment, this nourishing lip liner smoothly glides along the lips without skipping or tugging to amplify and define the lips, whilst locking in moisture. Formulated with a blend of jojoba oil and emollients, this long-wearing lip liner mimics the performance of silicone to hold your lip looks in place with an easy application. Warning: you’re about to be obsessed.

  • Free of gluten and fragrance

how_to_use: Follow the internal leaflet for Josh's expert tips on how to section hair, mix your colour and apply for the cleanest application, best coverage and glossy result.We recommend you choose a shade close to your natural colour, as seen in your root regrowth.This permanent colour is not designed for dramatic colour transformations.When selecting your shade, please note this permanent colour does not contain bleach and will not lighten hair.
description:
A permanent hair colouring kit.

Perfect your hair colour with the Josh Wood Colour Miracle Kit. Designed to deliver salon-quality, natural-looking, glossy results in just 30 minutes, this permanent hair colour kit belongs in your next haircare haul. With the addition of The Miracle Shot, a conditioning hair treatment booster, this permanent dye kit will strengthen and condition your hair while you colour, like never before. 

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free
- 100% coverage over grey hairs 
- Ammonia-free

__Kit includes: __

- The Miracle Shot
- Expert Permanent Colour
- Colour Activator 
- Salon Grade Gloves
- Protective Barrier Cream
- Stain Removing Wipe
- Deep Conditioning Treatment

raw_how_to_use:
• Follow the internal leaflet for Josh's expert tips on how to section hair, mix your colour and apply for the cleanest application, best coverage and glossy result.
  • We recommend you choose a shade close to your natural colour, as seen in your root regrowth.

  • When selecting your shade, please note this permanent colour does not contain bleach and will not lighten hair.

how_to_use: Apply our Rapid Elixir every day, 3-5 days before sun or sunbed exposure. This is the vital preparation phase.Continue to use daily during periods of consistent sunshine.
description:
A tan accelerating lotion.

Time to put yourself in full acceleration with The Fox Tan Rapid Elixir. This tan accelerating lotion with an almond oil, carrot root extract, cocoa seed butter, jojoba oil, and FoxComplex formula prepares your skin by boosting melanin production before you hit the sun. A step you don’t want to skip!

- Vegan
- Cruelty free

Semi-Permanent Hair Color", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/p/good-dye-young/streaks-and-strands-on-tour-semi-permanent-hair-color/"}]
description:
A range of semi-permanent hair colours for smaller sections of hair.

Switch up your hair colour with the Streaks & Strands Semi-Permanent Dye from Good Dye Young. With an ultra-creamy formula that deeply conditions while depositing super-sweet, vibrant colour, these semi-permanent hair dyes harness the power of a high-quality mask while colouring sections of the hair (think money pieces, fringes and streaks) so your results feel and look good. Simply choose your favourite shade (or mix n match) and get to work, your hair is going to love you.

- For best results, lighten hair before use
- Always perform a test strand to determine colour payoff
- Suitable for all hair types and textures
- Vegan
- Cruelty-free
- Free from paraben, ammonia, peroxide, bleach and phthalates
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearyl Alcohol, Peg 40 Castor Oil, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Octyldodecanol, Proplyene Glycol, Glycerin, Laureth 4, Laureth 23, Polyquaternium 6, Citris Bergamina (Bergamot Oil), Methlchlorisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Extract, Extrait D\u2019heliantus Annuus (Tournesol) May Also Contain: Basic Yellow 40, H C Blue 15, Basic Blue 99, Basic Orange 31, Basic Red 51, Basic Violet 16, Basic Violet 2, Basic Yellow 87, H C Blue 2, H C Red 1, H C Yellow 4."}]
product_name: Streaks & Strands On Tour! Semi-Permanent Hair Color
raw_how_to_use:
• To create the best canvas for your color, we recommend lightening your hair using the GDY Streaks & Strands Kit.
  • Product will stain, so protect hands, all surfaces and clothing.
  • Apply shea butter, coconut oil or thick conditioner to the hairline to prevent staining.
  • Mix color in the GDY Color Mixing Bowl and use gloves to prevent staining hands.
  • Ensure you strand test first before applying color all over your head.
  • Section and apply directly onto dry hair. Make sure color is fully saturated at every step by combining product through each section.
  • Let the color sit for at least 30 minutes.

  • Rinse with cold water and style as desired with GDY Prime.

  • Allow at least 24 hours before your first shampoo.
  • Rinse hair with cool water each time you wash to minimize fading process.
  • Reduce hair washing days to extend color.

how_to_use: To shape lips, begin by following the natural lip line. Slightly over line cupid’s bow and bottom centre lip for a fuller pout effect.For a natural contoured lip look use a shade 1 to 2 shades deeper than your natural lip colour and or skin tone. Fill in lips with choice of lipstick, lip gloss, or lip balm.Note: You may experience a slight to intense tingle. Apply only within perimeter of lips. If applied on skin, a temporary redness may occur. If any discomfort is present, remove and discontinue use. Keep away from children. Please be aware that safety information may change or vary from time to time. Please refer to the safety information on the product package you receive for the most up-to-date information.

product_name: Pure Color Envy Luxe Eyeshadow Quad
raw_how_to_use:
• Use the sponge tips of the included applicators for smooth, high-impact color.
  • For a sheer look, follow with brush tip to blend.
  • Create a variety of eye looks from Natural to Smoky.

Natural Eye:

  • Apply light shade all over lid. Blend medium shade into crease, then blend upwards. Easy & effortless!

Sultry & Smoky Eye:

  • Apply darkest shade onto lid, crease and lower lashline. Blend medium shade above crease, then blend to soften. Smoky in seconds!

Monochromatic Eye:

  • Apply medium shade onto the lid, crease and lower lash line. Blend light shade above crease. Monochromatic in minutes!

Dress with confidence by hauling the Brushworks Reusable Silicone Nipple Covers. Reusable and waterproof, these silicone nipple covers apply effortlessly to create a smooth and discreet look under tight clothing for an undetectable finish. With a selection of shades to choose from, these nipple covers belong in your next haul.

description:
A multi-action firming, lifting, and radiance-boosting cream.

Meet the (miracle) cream that combats multiple signs of ageing, the Estee Lauder	Revitalizing Supreme+ Eye Balm 3-Piece Skincare Gift Set. Powered by 99% naturally derived hibiscus morning bloom, peptides plus exclusive moringa extracts, this wonder cream works to smooth the look of fine lines and wrinkles and defend the skin against environmental stressors. Hyaluronic acid and cactus stem cell extract join forces to enrich the skin with 72-hour hydration and leave it and its vital moisture barrier noticeably stronger and plumper. Featuring a silky and indulgent consistency, this melts-quickly into-the-skin moisturiser uses intense nourishment (that doesn’t clog the pores or leave an oily feel) to deal with dehydration and dullness effectively.

description:
A facial therapy device.

Care for your face at a deeper level with the Therabody TheraFace PRO. Combining eight treatments in one easy to use device, this facial therapy saviour helps to combat multiple issues, for happy and healthy results. Using a variety of treatment rings to create personalised routines to help lift, tone, relax facial muscles and achieve healthier looking skin, this device belongs on your radar.

__Features:__

- Percussive Therapy: Use the percussive attatchements to reduce tension and relax facial muscles
- Microcurrent Ring Use this attachment to firms and tighten the skin, improving muscle tone and contour in the face/neck
- LED Ring (RED) helps to reduce wrinkles around the eyes
- LED Ring (BLUE) helps to reduce mild to moderate acne
- LED Ring (RED + Infrared) helps to reduce the wrinkles around the eyes & is shown to increase the body’s natural healing
- Cleansing Ring: Use this attachment to gently (but thoroughly) cleanse and remove facial build-up of dirt, oil, and debris

__Kit Includes:__

- TheraFace PRO device
- 3 Percussive attachments (Cone, Micro-Point, Flat)
- Microcurrent Ring
- LED Ring (Red, Blue, & Red+ Infrared Light)
- Cleansing Ring
- TheraOne Conductive Gel (1.7 oz)
- Soft Carrying Bag
- Stand
- USB-A to USB-C charging cable

description:
A calming toner for dehydrated and irritation prone skin. 

Stressed out skin? Try adding Glow Hub’s Calm & Soothe Toner Essence to comfort, hydrated, and soothe skin that needs a chill. The gentle toner is made with a calming blend of balancing jojoba extract and omega rich hemp seed oil, plus willow bark to tackle excess oil and aloe vera to soften. When used in daily AM and PM, the toner leaves the skin feeling calm, comfortable, and perfectly prepped for your following skincare. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty free

description:
20” clip-in remy double hair extensions.

Say hello to instant length, volume, and thickness with the Beauty Works 20” Double Hair Set Clip-In Extensions. This hair essential is built of a six-piece set of clip-in extensions that provide a natural, boosted look you can treat just like your own. Your hair is going to love you!

- 100% remy cuticle retained human hair.
- Suitable for fine, medium, and thick hair types.
- Ethically sourced and regulated hair
- Multi award-winning hair extensions
- Can be heated, styled, and washed like your own hair.

Pack Contains:
- Six Clip-in extension wefts.
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "100% Remy Cuticle Retained Human Hair"}]
raw_how_to_use:
• Apply Beauty Works extensions in the comfort of your own home, simply style clean, dry hair to blend into the wave pattern of the hair extensions.

  • Then, section off your own hair from your temples to your crown, insert each weft wherever necessary and secure them in place by snapping each clip tight to the root of your own hair.

  • Let down your hair over each weft, repeat throughout the hairline until you're fully satisfied with your new lengths.

A lip oil-gloss hybrid. 

Soften your lips with the Too Faced Kissing Jelly Lip Oil Gloss. With a cushiony and comfortable consistency, this lip oil-gloss hybrid uses a blend of nourishing natural oils to soften the lips and coat them in sheer colour. Featuring an extra-large applicator, this high-shine lip oil-gloss hybrid applies smoothly with a non-sticky and non-greasy finish. Thanks to its juicy sweet scent, this lip-loving oil-gloss hybrid ensures your lips smell as good as they feel and look. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Free of silicones and gluten

description:
A tan-setting powder.

Bring out the richness of your tan with the EFFN Beauty EFFN Tan Setting Powder. Designed to deepen set, and keep your tan transfer-free, this powder is perfect for areas like the décolletage, chest, shins, inner elbows, and neck that don’t tan as well. It can be swept on after tanning foam to achieve bronzed flawlessness with an airbrushed finish that won’t budge.

description:

description:
A hydrating, brightening concealer.

With the Estee Lauder Futurist Soft Touch Brightening Skincealer, skin is instantly hydrated and looks brighter, more radiant, and more perfected, minus any creasing or caking. With a silky hybrid formula, enriched with brightening vitamin C, hydrating hyaluronic acid, and firming Tri-Firming Complex, this medium-to-full coverage concealer plumps fine, dry lines and improves hydration and radiance, in one swipe. With a soft-touch applicator, designed for precision application and easy blending, this all-day wear, water, swear and humidity-resistant concealer belongs in your makeup routine.

- Non- comedogenic
- Free of sulphite, SLS/SLES, drying alcohol

raw_how_to_use:
• Apply this brightening concealer as needed to cover-up dark circles, spots, imperfections, and more.
  • Choose a concealer shade that matches your skin tone and foundation or is one shade lighter.

HOW TO DETERMINE YOUR UNDERTONE:

  • Cool (C) undertones: Bare skin has a rosy tone and burns easily in the sun.
  • Neutral (N) undertones: Bare skin is more even toned, not too pink or golden.
  • Warm (W) undertones: Bare skin has a golden or olive tone and tans easily in the sun.

You’re welcome.

description:
A lengthening and volumising mascara. 

Sky high lashes just got easier with Maybelline’s Lash Sensational Sky High Mascara. The long-lasting mascara delivers full volume and intense length with just a swipe to create high lash impact from every angle. With Maybelline’s exclusive Flex Tower brush to bend to the natural shape of the lashes from root to tip to deliver the blackest black colour that won’t flake or smudge. Infused with bamboo extract and fibres, the mascara leaves the lashes looking effortlessly long, full, and lightweight lashes. 

- Allergy tested
- Ophthalmologist tested
- Suitable for sensitive eyes and contact lens wearers

description:
A long-wear, SPF 15 face and body foundation. 

For a foundation that beats the test of time, get the Estee Lauder Double Wear Maximum Cover Camouflage Foundation for Face & Body SPF15. Featuring an SPF of 15 to defend, this foundation effortlessly __covers all skin perfections (including surgical and acne scars, birthmarks, sunspots, and varicose veins)__. __Offering 12-hour wear__ and full coverage, this soothing foundation can be applied to the face or body to achieve a matte, natural-looking finish that __doesn’t transfer or clog the pores.__

raw_description:
A long-wear, SPF 15 face and body foundation.

For a foundation that beats the test of time, get the Estee Lauder Double Wear Maximum Cover Camouflage Foundation for Face & Body SPF15. Featuring an SPF of 15 to defend, this foundation effortlessly covers all skin perfections (including surgical and acne scars, birthmarks, sunspots, and varicose veins). Offering 12-hour wear and full coverage, this soothing foundation can be applied to the face or body to achieve a matte, natural-looking finish that doesn’t transfer or clog the pores.

description:
A full coverage concealer.

Skincare meets makeup with the Glow Hub Under Cover Concealer. Perfect for when your breakouts need some coverage and care, this multi-action concealer delivers long-lasting, high coverage while giving your blemishes a hit of salicylic acid, white willow bark and tea tree, to help control bacteria and improve the appearance of breakouts and redness.

- Tried, tested, and loved by the BEAUTY BAY staff – discover why __[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/staff-faves-august-2022/)__

how_to_use: Use the unique, curved applicator to apply product for instantly fuller, plump, hydrated lips.
description:
A light-reflecting, plumping gloss.

Love to complete your lip looks with a wash of (blinding) light-reflecting shine? The Kevyn Aucoin Celestial Lip Gloss will be right up your street. With a comfortable, cushioning formula, this lip gloss coats the lips in creamy, near-sheer colour that can be built up or down for intensity. Combining nourishing vitamin E and ricinoleic acid with a unique gelling agent, this lip gloss transforms the lips with a three-dimensional plump that instantly takes effect with no stinging or burning. Its doe-foot applicator features an innovative lip-hugging, curved shape, and pointed tip deposits the perfect amount of product to leave the lips with a light-reflecting shine and precise application. Pair it with your fave lip products or wear it by itself.

Vegan
Free of parabens, sulphates, fragrance, mica, and gluten

how_to_use: Need a blush hack? Here's how to apply blush powder for a butta blend.Lightly tap your brush into the pan to pick up pigment, then swirl the brush on the high points of your cheek, around the temples, and even across the nose for a warm flush of blush.Layer over Buttermelt Bronzer for a warm natural sun-soaked bronzed look and make it butta together!
description:
A powder blush. 

For a flush of blush that spreads like butter, you need the NYX Professional Makeup Buttermelt Blush. Offering up to 12-hour wear, this blush applies effortlessly and blends seamlessly to provide a blooming pop of pigment that doesn’t fade or transfer. Enriched with a moisturising medley of mango butter, almond butter, and shea butter, blush doesn’t get butta than this. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

raw_how_to_use:
• Need a blush hack? Here's how to apply blush powder for a butta blend.
  • Lightly tap your brush into the pan to pick up pigment, then swirl the brush on the high points of your cheek, around the temples, and even across the nose for a warm flush of blush.
  • Layer over Buttermelt Bronzer for a warm natural sun-soaked bronzed look and make it butta together!

description:
A flavoured sugar scrub. 

Scrub your way to smoother and softer skin with the Tree Hut Blue Lagoon Shea Sugar Scrub. Designed to deeply nourish the skin, this sugar scrub helps to remove dull and dead skin, promote skin elasticity, smooth texture, and soothe and soften irritable skin. description:
A five-piece set of tanning essentials. 

Get your tan on with EFFN Beauty’s Tanning Journal. In this set you’ll find five tanning products and accessories that help you achieve a glowing tan. This includes the Tanning Foam, a hydrating and quick-drying instant tanning foam, the Gradual Tan, a gradual tanning lotion, the Tanning Water, a refreshing tanning mist, and the Tanning Mitt and the Tanning Brush that offer a seamless and effortless application. Haul for beautifully bronzed skin! 

- Vegan
- Cruelty-Free
- Free of dye, parabens, and alcohol

__Set contains:__

- Tanning Foam – A hydrating and quick-drying instant tanning foam that is formulated with colour guidance to help you achieve the ideal tan with a non-sticky finish.
- Gradual Tan – A gradual tanning lotion that uses a lightweight and nourishing formula to hydrate the skin and gradually deliver a natural-looking tan that glows. 
- Tanning Water – A refreshing tanning mist that uses a quick-drying and hydrating formula to help you achieve smooth and soft bronzed skin with an easy application. 
- Tanning Mitt – A tanning mitt that offers a seamless and streak-free application for a rich bronzed glow. 
- Tanning Brush – A tanning brush that ensures a smooth and seamless application on the face and body, even those hard-to-reach areas.

raw_how_to_use:
Tanning Foam:

  • Exfoliate 24 hours before tanning.
  • Apply foam, with a velvet mitt, to clean dry skin using long circular sweeping motions. Use remaining residue on hands, feet, elbows, and knees.
  • Allow to develop over 6-8 hours, then lightly rinse with warm water.
  • To maintain, regularly exfoliate and moisturise. For optimal results, use fragrance-free products from the EFFN range.
  • Reapply as often as desired.

Tanning Water:

  • Apply to clean dry skin, close eyes and mist, saturating face, and body.
  • For optimal application blend using EFFN brush.
  • Develops over 4-8 hours. Use daily to reach your desired glow.
  • Once achieved, reapply every 2-3 days to maintain.

Gradual Tan:

  • Exfoliate 24 hours before tanning.
  • For optimal application, pump lotion onto a velvet mitt and apply using circular motions directly to the body.
  • Alternatively, use hands, washing thoroughly after use.
  • Develops over 4-8 hours.
  • Use daily to reach your desired glow.
  • Once achieved, reapply every 2-3 days.
  • To maintain, gently exfoliate and moisturise regularly.

how_to_use: Full face & neck lift:Prepare: Make sure your face is clean and free of make-up. Apply our specially formulated Hydrating MicroCurrent Gel.Power on: Turn on the SmartSonic Pulsation and MicroCurrent Face Lift Technology by holding the power button for 2 seconds. Select the desired intensity by using the plus and minus buttons.Lift: Starting at the chin, glide the device along your jawline, nose, smile lines, cheeks, and up your neck, repeating each motion several times on both sides of your face and neck.Finish: Turn the device off by holding the power button for 2 seconds and rinse the device with water to clean it. Clean your device with a GESKE device cleanser after every use.Points to target:Jawline: Starting at the chin, turn the device sideways and gently glide it outward along the jawline. Next, move up to the nasal fold and glide the device up and out to the ear.Smile lines: Keeping the device horizontal, roll from the smile lines, outward along the cheek bone and then up to the temple.Forehead: Start from the temple and glide the device in an upward motion towards the hairline. Repeat this motion, making your way across the forehead.Neck: Start at the bottom of the neck, by the shoulder, and glide the device in an upward motion on the side of the neck, up to the jawline. Do not go over the throat. Next, repeat this gliding motion, but this time go all the way past the jaw to the cheekbone.
description:
A 6-in-1 facial-contouring microcurrent device. 

Tone, tighten, and transform our complexion with the GESKE MicroCurrent Face-Lifter 6 in 1 Gray. Providing a facial session and workout for your skin and facial muscles, this device features Ultra-Gentle Contouring & Firming Spheres that smoothly glide along the face to release small microcurrents which stimulate the skin’s natural healing process to tighten and firm. Low Voltage Current makes this device totally safe to use, while Anti-Ageing Massage and SmartSonic Pulsation Technologies boost blood circulation, purge the pores of toxins, and ease facial tension. P.S. The GESKE Hydrating MicroCurrent Gel is a must when using the MicroCurrent Face-Lift Technology because it perfectly preps your skin for the rejuvenating effects and also moisturises it.

__Don’t forget to download the app__

For video guides, an AI-powered skin scan, expert tips, and a personal guide - download the GESKE German Beauty Tech

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Phthalate-free 
- Suitable for all skin types

*FYI: This electrical device features a UK (type G) plug*

raw_how_to_use:
Full face & neck lift:

Prepare: Make sure your face is clean and free of make-up. Apply our specially formulated Hydrating MicroCurrent Gel.

Power on: Turn on the SmartSonic Pulsation and MicroCurrent Face Lift Technology by holding the power button for 2 seconds. Select the desired intensity by using the plus and minus buttons.

Lift: Starting at the chin, glide the device along your jawline, nose, smile lines, cheeks, and up your neck, repeating each motion several times on both sides of your face and neck.

Finish: Turn the device off by holding the power button for 2 seconds and rinse the device with water to clean it. Clean your device with a GESKE device cleanser after every use.

Points to target:

Jawline: Starting at the chin, turn the device sideways and gently glide it outward along the jawline. Next, move up to the nasal fold and glide the device up and out to the ear.

Smile lines: Keeping the device horizontal, roll from the smile lines, outward along the cheek bone and then up to the temple.

Forehead: Start from the temple and glide the device in an upward motion towards the hairline. Repeat this motion, making your way across the forehead.

Neck: Start at the bottom of the neck, by the shoulder, and glide the device in an upward motion on the side of the neck, up to the jawline. Do not go over the throat. Next, repeat this gliding motion, but this time go all the way past the jaw to the cheekbone.

description:
A concealer/foundation hybrid face pen.

With up to 36 hours of customisable coverage, the MAC Cosmetics Studio Fix Every-Wear All-Over Face Pen belongs in your makeup routine. how_to_use: Wearing the gloves provided, gradually massage small amounts of gloss evenly onto clean, damp hair.Starting from the roots and avoiding the scalp, to prevent colour staining, work gloss through to ends of hair.Leave for 10 minutes on light hair and up to a maximum of 20 minutes on dark hair to achieve the desired colour result.Rinse well, until water runs clear. Dry and style hair as usual.For best results, use a quarter of a tube for short to medium hair and half a tube for long hair.
description:
A semi-permanent hair treatment gloss.

Colour as you condition with the Josh Wood Colour Gloss. Designed to help you refresh or switch up your hair colour as you nourish each strand, this treatment gloss is your one-way ticket for the ultimate rich, shiny finish. Lasting up to 6 weeks per treatment, this treatment contains nourishing shea butter and perilla oil, and it sounds like your kinda vibe. Good hair days are on their way…

- Tried, tested, and loved by the BEAUTY BAY staff – find out why __[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/staff-faves-july-2022/)__
- We’re obsessed with this colour-boosting treatment – find out why __[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/josh-wood-colour-hair-gloss-review/)__
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Aqua/Water/Eau, Cetearyl alcohol, PPG-3 Benzyl Ether Myristate, Behentrimonium Chloride, Bis-cetearyl Amodimethicone, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Glyceryl Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Butyrospermum Park (Shea) Butter, Perilla Ocymoides Seed Oil, Fragrance (Parfum), Isopropyl Alcohol, Panthenol, Lactic Acid, DMDM Hydantoin, Glycerin, Hydrolyzed Quinoa, Ceteareth-25, Ceteareth-7, Ethylhexyl Methohycinnamate, Hydrolyzed Walnut Extract, Limonene, Butylene Glycol, Linalool, Phenoxyethanol, Triethanolamine, Citrus Reticulata (Tangerine) Peel Oil, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Peel Oil, Caprylyl Glycol, Glycolic Acid, Citrus Aurantium Amara (Bitter Orange) Leaf/Twig Oil, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Hydroxycitronellal, Geraniol, Citral, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Benzoate, BHT, HC Blue No.16, Basic Red 51"}]
raw_how_to_use:
• Wearing the gloves provided, gradually massage small amounts of gloss evenly onto clean, damp hair.
  • Starting from the roots and avoiding the scalp, to prevent colour staining, work gloss through to ends of hair.
  • Leave for 10 minutes on light hair and up to a maximum of 20 minutes on dark hair to achieve the desired colour result.
  • Rinse well, until water runs clear. Dry and style hair as usual.
  • For best results, use a quarter of a tube for short to medium hair and half a tube for long hair.

description:
A long-wear matte foundation. 

Ace your base with the MAC Cosmetics STUDIO FIX FLUID FOUNDATION. Lightweight but long-wearing, this foundation applies effortlessly to deliver natural-looking coverage with a soft-matte finish and a breathable feel. With a formula that’s 87% skincare ingredients like hyaluronic acid, this SPF 15 foundation hydrates the skin, strengthens and reinforces the skin barrier, and provides protection against UV rays and PA++ while controlling oil levels. Offering up to 24 hours of comfortable, crease-proof, and set-proof wear, this foundation can be built up to achieve your desired level of coverage, without clogging the pores, for either a natural tint or a full-glam look.

how_to_use: Prep skin with water-based formulas.For dry skin, pair with a hydrating primer. For oily skin, pair with a mattifying primer.Using 1-2 pumps, start by applying in the centre of the face and blend outwards. Pair with a brush for full coverage or a beauty sponge for lighter coverage. Focus on desired areas to build coverage as needed.
description:
A blurring, matte-finish foundation. 

Blurred base? The Anastasia Beverly Hills Impeccable Blurring Second Skin Matte Foundation has you covered. Harnessing the power of Precision Blur Technology, this foundation helps blur, smooth, and noticeably correct uneven tones, discolouration, redness, and breakouts. Weightless and water-based, this foundation blends effortlessly and doesn’t oxidise to deliver medium to full coverage with 12 hours of water-resistant, never-cakey wear. This no-flashback formula leaves behind a second-skin finish that doesn’t melt, slip, separate, settle into lines, or clog the pores. Featuring a blend of skin-loving ingredients like hyaluronic acid and bixa orellana, this foundation blurs pores and imperfections and infuses the skin with moisture with a plumping effect. Available in versatile variety of shades and undertones, this foundation really does check all your boxes. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Free of phthalates, gluten, mineral oil, talc, sulphates, parabens, oil, and fragrance
- Suitable for all skin types (especially oily skin)

description:
A strengthening hair mask.

Strengthen your strands with the KERASILK Strengthening Mask. Formulated with mineral-rich biomimetic silk and konjac root powder, this nourishing hair mask enriches the hair with long-lasting hydration (that lasts up to five washes) to thoroughly reinforce and plump the hair from the inside out. Made with fine, limp, and weak hair in mind, this natural hair mask works to lessen hair breakage for hair that is 18X stronger. Fragranced with the floral sweetness of flowers and amber notes, this hair mask ensures your hair smells as good as it looks and feels. 

- Vegan 
- Free of sulphates, dyes, microplastics, and mineral oils

description:
An intensive lip treatment. 

Let your lips feel the love when you add the Nabla Viper Lip Mask to your basket. Combining hyaluronic acid with vegetable butters, this lip treatment melts into the lips to boost hydration and elasticity, smooth, soften, and nourish. A lip-loving blend of peptides, phospholipids, and natural extracts works to strengthen the skin barrier and enhance firmness and fullness for lips that are repaired and plumper from the first application. Featuring a heavenly scent, this glossy-finish-giving lip balm is your defence against chapped dryness. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

A medium to full coverage liquid foundation with SPF20.

Clinique’s Even Better Clinical Serum Foundation is a medium to full coverage, oil-free foundation, with a satin matte finish for bare skin that looks even better. Perfect for combination to oily complexions, the weightless, serum-like formula transforms skin with every wear, thanks to its protective SPF20 and serum technologies. Vitamin C and molecule UP302 targets dark spots, salicylic acid smooths the skin and hyaluronic acid plumps up the skin- for a beautifully even and smooth complexion, that lasts all day.

- Dermatologist tested
- Waterproof
- Oil-free
- Fragrance-free
- Paraben, phthalate, oil, SLS, SLES and synthetic colour free

raw_description:
A medium to full coverage liquid foundation with SPF20.

Clinique’s Even Better Clinical Serum Foundation is a medium to full coverage, oil-free foundation, with a satin matte finish for bare skin that looks even better. Perfect for combination to oily complexions, the weightless, serum-like formula transforms skin with every wear, thanks to its protective SPF20 and serum technologies. Vitamin C and molecule UP302 targets dark spots, salicylic acid smooths the skin and hyaluronic acid plumps up the skin- for a beautifully even and smooth complexion, that lasts all day.

  • Dermatologist tested
  • Waterproof
  • Oil-free
  • Fragrance-free
  • Paraben, phthalate, oil, SLS, SLES and synthetic colour free
  • Each glass bottle can be recycled
  • Suitable for combination and oily skin types

description:
Self-tan drops that can be mixed with skincare, makeup, or body care.

Looking for a customisable tan? We’ve got you with the Tanologist Self Tan Face & Body Drops. Suitable for tanning newbies and addicts alike, these self-tanning drops can be combined with your favourite skincare, makeup, or bodycare for a personalised tan. The 100% vegan, clear formula means no blocked pores or stained sheets, whilst the addition of pink grapefruit, goji berry, and juniper helps to brighten, soften, and hydrate the skin. The more drops, the deeper the colour.

-	Vegan
-	Cruelty-free
-	Non-comedogenic
-	Can be used on the face and body
-	Find out why we're obsessed Tanologist <u>__[here](https://www.beautybay.com/edited/tanologist/)__</u>
-	This face tan is perfect for acne prone skin – find out why <u>__[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/face-tans-for-acne-prone-skin/)__</u>

description:
A fruity, floral eau de parfum. 

Juicy and sensational, DKNY’s Be Delicious Eau de Parfum is a fresh and floral fragrance that embodies the playful charm of spontaneity. This refreshing and energetic fragrance opens with the crispness of violet leaf, apple, grapefruit, and magnolia that are intertwined with the floral notes of tuberose, lily of the valley, rose, and violet. While the creamy base notes of sandalwood, musk, and amber add a rich and sultry depth to this bright and light fragrance. 

- __Fragrance Family:__ floral-fruity 
- __Top Notes:__ cucumber, grapefruit, magnolia
- __Mid Notes:__ green apple, lily-of-the-valley, tuberose, violet, rose
- __Base Notes:__ sandalwood, musk, amber

A full-coverage concealer.

Suitable for all skin types, Close-Up Concealer effectively covers imperfections, dark circles, redness and discoloration for a natural, flawless finish. Available in nine shades, the smooth, creamy formula glides over the skin for effortless application and blending.

-	Vegan
-	Cruelty free
-	One of the best full coverage concealers – find out why we love it __[here](https://www.beautybay.com/edited/best-full-coverage-concealers/)__

description:
A flashback-free and full coverage concealer.

Crease-proof and life-proof, ConcealXX is the long-wearing base essential your makeup kit needs. Perfect for concealing imperfections, covering blemishes and dark circles, and brightening the skin, this nourishing concealer is also enriched with vitamin E and hyaluronic acid. 

- Cruelty free
- Vegan

description:
A brow powder stamp with four stencils.

Your brow routine doesn’t have to take hours, or even minutes. You just need to stamp and go with Makeup Revolution’s Brow Powder Stamp & Stencil Kit. The ultimate way to create easy, professional looking brows in two steps, the kit includes four stencils to help you find your perfect brow. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty free

raw_how_to_use:
• Place your chosen brow stencil and apply over your eyebrow.
  • Lightly press the powder brow stamp over the stencil to fill to your desired intensity.
  • Lift the brow stencil and stamp.

description:
A blush and highlighter duo compact.

Love a two-in-one? Then, you’re going to love the ICONIC London Silk Glow Duo. This two-in-one compact includes a highlighter and blush, both built with buttery soft, ultra-fine formulas that deliver a glossy shot of radiance and flush of colour in one sweep, without leaving behind that powdery look. A multipurpose makeup must-have!

- Cruelty free

how_to_use: STEP 1: OUTLINE + FILL: Outline the shape and fill in sparse areas of the brow using Brow Definer, blending through with the spoolie brush.STEP 2: DETAIL: Starting at the highest point of the brow, apply hair-like strokes in sparse areas using Brow Wiz®. Use light pressure and apply in the direction of hair growth. Blend as you go using the spoolie brush for a natural finish.STEP 3: FINISH: Finish the brows by brushing Mini Clear Brow Gel through the brow in short, upward motions.
description:
A three-piece set of eyebrow defining essentials. 

Wow with your brows when you use the Anastasia Beverly Hills Natural & Polished Kit. Inside you’ll find three of Anastasia Beverly Hills OG brow-shaping, setting, and defining products. This includes the Clear Brow Gel, a clear brow gel, the Brow Definer, a triangular-tipped retractable eyebrow pencil, and the Brow Wiz, an ultra-slim eyebrow pen. 

- Cruelty-free 
- Free of mineral oil, sulphates, fragrance, and phthalates

__Set contains:__

- Clear Brow Gel - A clear brow gel that uses a lightweight formula to slick brow hairs into place with a long-lasting flexible hold. Infused with chamomile to soothe and hyaluronic acid to hydrate, this gel dries clear without feeling stiff or leaving behind residue.
- Brow Definer - A triangular-tipped retractable eyebrow pencil that applies effortlessly without skipping to help you create hair-like detail and shading with precision while the spoolie brush lets you groom the brows for a natural-looking finish.
- Brow Wiz - An ultra-slim eyebrow pen that uses a pigmented, dry wax formula to help you create defined, hair-like strokes, while its built-in spoolie brush end can be used to groom the brows and blend product for a natural-looking finish.

raw_how_to_use:
• STEP 1: OUTLINE + FILL: Outline the shape and fill in sparse areas of the brow using Brow Definer, blending through with the spoolie brush.
  • STEP 2: DETAIL: Starting at the highest point of the brow, apply hair-like strokes in sparse areas using Brow Wiz®. Use light pressure and apply in the direction of hair growth. Blend as you go using the spoolie brush for a natural finish.
  • STEP 3: FINISH: Finish the brows by brushing Mini Clear Brow Gel through the brow in short, upward motions.
raw_description:
A three-piece set of eyebrow defining essentials.

Wow with your brows when you use the Anastasia Beverly Hills Natural & Polished Kit. Inside you’ll find three of Anastasia Beverly Hills OG brow-shaping, setting, and defining products. This includes the Clear Brow Gel, a clear brow gel, the Brow Definer, a triangular-tipped retractable eyebrow pencil, and the Brow Wiz, an ultra-slim eyebrow pen.

  • Cruelty-free
  • Free of mineral oil, sulphates, fragrance, and phthalates

Set contains:

  • Clear Brow Gel - A clear brow gel that uses a lightweight formula to slick brow hairs into place with a long-lasting flexible hold. Infused with chamomile to soothe and hyaluronic acid to hydrate, this gel dries clear without feeling stiff or leaving behind residue.
  • Brow Definer - A triangular-tipped retractable eyebrow pencil that applies effortlessly without skipping to help you create hair-like detail and shading with precision while the spoolie brush lets you groom the brows for a natural-looking finish.
  • Brow Wiz - An ultra-slim eyebrow pen that uses a pigmented, dry wax formula to help you create defined, hair-like strokes, while its built-in spoolie brush end can be used to groom the brows and blend product for a natural-looking finish.

description:
A matte, medium to full coverage foundation.

For a 24-hour, natural, matte finish, you need the iconic Estee Lauder Double Wear Stay in Place Foundation SPF 10. Available in a huge range of shades, to suit all skin tones, this liquid foundation buffs and blends into the skin for a water and sweat proof matte finish that lasts up to 24 hours (minus the creasing, caking and streaking). The liquid formula is perfect for evening skin tone and covering imperfections, with a buildable but super lightweight feel on the skin, that helps to keep oil production at bay. Pick your shade and add it to your haul ASAP.

- Oil-free
- Non-comedogenic
- Waterproof
- Dermatologist tested
- Synthetic fragrance and gluten free
- Find out all the reasons why we love Estée Lauder’s Double Wear Foundation __[here](https://www.beautybay.com/edited/estee-lauder-doublewear-foundation/)__
- These are the best waterproof foundations – discover them all __[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/best-waterproof-foundations/)__

how_to_use: Dab a small amount of product to your preferred area of the face whether that be the apples of the cheeks or higher up on the cheekbones.Using your fingers, T06 brush or sponge blend upwards and build up a perfect blush.To set and intensify the pigment, top with any Cheek & Eye Blush of your choice. For a softer, more subtle look set with the Velvet Setting Powder.
description:
A liquid blush.

Rich pigment and maximum blendability? Sounds like Trigwell Cosmetics’ Liquid Blush. Not only is this formula lightweight but it also delivers a true-to-tone, sunkissed hue to the complexion in a seamless application. With a soft-matte finish, this liquid blush helps to enhance the complexion’s natural flush to mimic a glow from within. Vibrant and a little goes a long way, what more could you ask for?

raw_how_to_use:
• Dab a small amount of product to your preferred area of the face whether that be the apples of the cheeks or higher up on the cheekbones.
  • Using your fingers, T06 brush or sponge blend upwards and build up a perfect blush.
  • To set and intensify the pigment, top with any Cheek & Eye Blush of your choice. For a softer, more subtle look set with the Velvet Setting Powder.
raw_description:
A liquid blush.

Rich pigment and maximum blendability? Sounds like Trigwell Cosmetics’ Liquid Blush. Not only is this formula lightweight but it also delivers a true-to-tone, sunkissed hue to the complexion in a seamless application. With a soft-matte finish, this liquid blush helps to enhance the complexion’s natural flush to mimic a glow from within. Vibrant and a little goes a long way, what more could you ask for?

description:
A full-coverage concealer. 

Complete your complexion with the multi-tasking Born This Way Super Coverage Concealer. Use to conceal, contour, and highlight with this natural finish, concealer-makeup hybrid. The multi-use formula is packed full of pigments that provide maximum coverage with a skin-like finish. The oil-free, non-comedogenic formula is weightless and hydrating, meaning your skin won’t look dry or cakey, thanks to the addition of radiant coconut water. The long-wear formula will last for up to 12 hours and is photo-friendly (no more flashback) – what’s not to love!

- Non-comedogenic
- Vegan
- Find out how to fake bleached brows __[here](https://www.beautybay.com/edited/how-to-fake-bleach-brows/)__

description:
A creamy concealer.

Makeup meets skincare with the Nabla Re-Generation Concealer. The creamy concealer effectively reduces the appearance of dark circles and covers skin imperfections, thanks to the formula packed with skin-loving, functional ingredients day after day to make skin look more toned, lifted and regenerated. Each shade melts seamlessly into skin, giving it a blurred, radiant finish that lasts all day, while the handy twist pen and sponge applicator distributes the perfect amount of product on the face with no waste, making it perfect for touch-ups during the day.

description:
A lightweight, buildable glowy foundation.

With a radiant, skin-loving, buildable formula, the Danessa Myricks Beauty Yummy Skin Serum Foundation is what your makeup routine is missing. Enriched with kind-to-skin ingredients like hydrating and plumping hyaluronic acid, deeply moisturising jojoba oil and olive-derived squalane to help balance oil production, this natural finish foundation sounds like your kinda vibe.

- Perfect for all skin types
- Medium, buildable coverage
- Vegan
- Cruelty-free
- Paraben and sulphate free

description:
A long-wear, matte foundation. 

For a foundation that lasts, you need the Maybelline Super Stay Lumi-Matte Foundation. Formulated with light wear technology, this amino acid-rich foundation offers buildable, medium-to-full coverage with a weightless feel and 30-hour wear. Offering a matte finish that has a diffused luminous glow, this waterproof and sweat-proof foundation applies effortlessly without transferring, caking, going patchy, or clogging the pores. You’re welcome. 

- Vegan

description:
A cherry-almond, floral eau de parfum.

Ghost’s Orb Of Night Eau de Parfum Spray features a flirty cherry-almond fragrance with notes of mandarin and bergamot on a base of caramel and warm sandalwood. Delicious orange blossom is also layered with white musk, for a calm, connected and warm scent. The eau de parfum is inspired by the soft focus of the night and the passionate sun rising, creating a calm energy as you spritz.

description:
A matte, medium to full coverage foundation.

For a 24-hour, natural, matte finish, you need the iconic Estee Lauder Double Wear Stay in Place Foundation SPF 10. Available in a huge range of shades, to suit all skin tones, this liquid foundation buffs and blends into the skin for a water and sweat proof matte finish that lasts up to 24 hours (minus the creasing, caking and streaking). The liquid formula is perfect for evening skin tone and covering imperfections, with a buildable but super lightweight feel on the skin, that helps to keep oil production at bay. Pick your shade and add it to your haul ASAP.

- Oil-free
- Non-comedogenic
- Waterproof
- Dermatologist tested
- Synthetic fragrance and gluten free

description:
A lightweight foundation.

The Mac Studio Radiance Serum Powered Foundation is what happens when skincare meets makeup. This foundation is fuelled by skincare to bring light-reflecting luminosity to your complexion in a buildable coverage. With thirty-three skincare ingredients and a nourishing blend of vitamin E, jojoba oil, and a 10% hyaluronic acid solution, this foundation seeps into the skin to increase hydration levels and strengthen the skin barrier. Its lightweight formula makes this the perfect foundation to smooth and blur the complexion for a natural and radiant skin-like finish.

raw_description:
A glowy cream blusher.

Get a healthy, flushed glow with the Melt Cosmetics Cream Blushlights. Taking inspiration from their iconic Blushlights powders, the new cream formula melts into the complexion for a dewy, real-skin finish. Available in a range of blush hues to suit any skin type, the subtle sheen of these cream blushers adds an extra dimension to the skin. The multi-use formula can be used on the face, eyes, and lips for a monochromatic finish. Simply buff and build for a tailored finish and you can wear alone or layered with your favourite Blushlights powders.

how_to_use: Start in centre of face, blending outward.Build coverage as needed.Remove with your favourite Clinique makeup remover.
description:
A lightweight, vitamin-rich foundation with SPF 50. 

A foundation that also provides skincare benefits and sun protection? It has to be the Clinique Even Better™ Vitamin Makeup SPF 50. Featuring a melt-into-the-skin formula, this weightless foundation blends seamlessly to reveal healthier-looking skin with a radiant finish. Never-settling and waterproof, this foundation transforms the complexion with light, colour-true coverage that stays streak-free, sweat and humidity-resistant, and cake-free for up to 12 hours.
Supercharged by vitamins (including 4% vitamin B3, five types of vitamin C, and vitamin E) this foundation boosts the skin’s natural energy, brightens, and provides antioxidant protection against environmental aggressors. With the help of SPF 50, this all-in-one foundation reflects and captures UV rays to shield the skin from sun damage, while delivering 12-hour hydration that won’t clog the pores. Your shortcut to skin that feels as good as it looks.  

- Free of fragrance, oil, sodium lauryl sulphate, and sodium laureth sulphate
- Suitable for sensitive, dry, dry-combination, combination-oily skin types 
- Dermatologist and ophthalmologist tested
- Safe for contact lens wearers

description:
A lip stain.

For a lip colour that doesn’t quit (it literally lasts all day), go for the Wonderskin Wonder Blading Lip Stain Masque. Designed to help you achieve fuller-looking lips without the semi-permanent tattoo, this high-tech formula __hyper-stains__ the lips for a waterproof colour that __doesn’t transfer, fade, feather__, or need a touch-up. Find your fave in any one of their no-fade shades or collect them all. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Free of gluten, alcohol, and parabens
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Lip Masque (4 ml / 0.135 fl.02): Water (Aqua/Eau), Pentylene Glycol, Butylene Glycol, Mica, Algin, Glycerin, Indigofera Tinctoria Leaf Extract, 1, 2-Hexandiol, Capryly| Glycol, Hydroxyethyl Acrylate/Sodium Acryloyldimethyl Taurate Copolymer, Squalane, Caprylic/Capric Glucoside, Flavor (Aroma), Polysorbate 80, Tin Oxide, Lactic Acid, Glucose. May Contain: Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Red 22 (CI 45380), Blue 1 (CI 42090), Red 40 (CI 16035), Yellow 5 (C1 19140), Red 33 (C117200)."}]
raw_how_to_use:
• Prep: Start with clean, dry lips. If needed, exfoliate lips first with a lip scrub.
  1. Apply 1-2 coats of the Lip Masque and leave on for 10-30 seconds.
  2. Wipe away with a damp towel or tissue to reveal an all-day lip colour!
  • Pro tips: To intensify the colour, repeat the application process.
  • For extra sheen, apply a lip balm or gloss on top of the colour after the application process is complete. WONDER BLADING will not fade or run when other lip products are layered over it.
  • To remove WONDER BLADING from lips, use an oil-based face cleanser or an oil-based makeup remover that takes off waterproof cosmetics.

Get flawless skin with the By BEAUTY BAY Future Bronze Body Base. This blurring, lightweight and instant body makeup gives an instant tint of tan whilst evening out skin tone. With a matte finish and moisturising formula, enriched with hyaluronic acid, castor oil, vitamin E, jojoba oil and sweet almond oil, you won't want to be without it.

A liquid eyeliner.

From the Made by Mitchell MILK Collection, the Graph-Ink Liquid Liner deserves a spot in your next haul. With a seamlessly-smooth formula plus a seriously smart brush applicator tip that gives you the freedom to create your own artistry, these liquid liners are here to transform your eye looks, for the better.  Whether you’re into bold colourful looks or everyday wear, there is a shade for everyone. Bag your faves today or collect them all.

how_to_use: Smooth onto the skin as after-sun care.
description:
An aloe gel. 

Treat your skin to the soothing nourishment it craves with the Standard Procedure Aloe Vera Gel. Formulated with locally sourced aloe vera plants from Australia, this natural gel moisturiser provides rehydrating, calming relief to ensure the skin feels refreshed and revived without any greasy and unwanted residue. Thanks to its clear dry-down, this hypoallergenic gel can be massaged into the hair before swimming as a protective layer against unwanted knots. What can’t this gel do? 

- Cruelty-free
- Australian-made

how_to_use: Apply to the complexion using a beauty sponge or a brush.
description:
A long-wear matte foundation. 

Ace your base with the MAC Cosmetics STUDIO FIX FLUID FOUNDATION. Lightweight but long-wearing, this foundation applies effortlessly to deliver natural-looking coverage with a soft-matte finish and a breathable feel. With a formula that’s 87% skincare ingredients like hyaluronic acid, this SPF 15 foundation hydrates the skin, strengthens and reinforces the skin barrier, and provides protection against UV rays and PA++ while controlling oil levels. Offering up to 24 hours of comfortable, crease-proof, and set-proof wear, this foundation can be built up to achieve your desired level of coverage, without clogging the pores, for either a natural tint or a full-glam look.

description:
A deeply hydrating moisturiser. 

Make dehydrated skin a thing of the past thanks to the Colloidal Oatmeal + Oat Lipid Rich Moisturiser from Skincare By BEAUTY BAY. This nourishing hydrator sinks into the skin to nourish and replenish the complexion during the day or whilst you sleep. Formulated with colloidal oatmeal that contains natural actives like beta-glucan and protein to help hydrate, soothe, and restore the skin, as well as oat lipid which is rich in ceramides, a natural component of the skin which helps to retain moisture without clogging pores, this moisturiser belongs in your skincare routine. 

- PSA: You may recognise this product as the Thirst Class Rich Moisturiser, it’s still the same formula you know and love, just with a new look
- Suitable for normal and dry skin types 
- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free
- Money back promise ([see T&Cs](https://www.beautybay.com/s/money-back-guarantee/))

description:
A cream to powder blush balm stick.

Ace your base with the Nudies Matte Lux All Over Face Blush Colour, a buttery soft matte cream-to-powder blush stick. This soft, lightweight cream blush has a buildable but natural formula that can be used on the cheeks, eyes, and lips for a sheer wash of colour or vivid pop of blush. The dual-ended stick includes the cream blush on one end and a blending brush on the other, making this the makeup must-have for on-the-go.

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free
- Fragrance, paraben, sulphate and silicone free

how_to_use: Using the point of the wand, trace the Cupid’s bow to centre lip shape and line outer edges.Gently swipe flat paddle edge of wand across lips in one smooth gesture for full-pigment, true-matte soft focus colour.
description:
A matte liquid lipstick.

Let your lips make a statement when you use the Anastasia Beverly Hills Lip Velvet. Enriched with lip-loving ingredients, this liquid lipstick applies effortlessly to nourish the lips and deliver full-pigment colour with a true-matte, soft focus finish that doesn’t feel heavy or dry.  Offering comfortable cushioned wear, this velvety smooth lipstick features a triangular wand and pointed tip to help you precisely line and shape the lips while its mousse consistency diffuses the appearance of lip texture for a blurred and flattering look. 

- Cruelty-free

how_to_use:
Apply the tanning mousse onto clean, dry skin in circular motions with a tanning mitt.Apply one layer for a medium glow or two layers for a deep noticeable tan.Rinse after 6-8 hours.Tanning Tips:
Before tanning:Exfoliate 24 hours before you apply your self tan. Ensuring all old self tan & any dead skin cells are removed!Remove all unwanted hair at least 24hours prior to tanning. Splash cold water over shaved areas to close pores & reduce black dots.Do not apply moisturiser, perfume or makeup at the time of application, these products will act as a barrier across your skin and will prevent tan from developing correctly.
After Tanning:Wear dark loose clothing, tight clothing & waist bands can rub away your tan.Use an oil free moisturiser daily to prolong your tan.

description:
A medium/dark, red-toned self-tanning mousse, with zero orange tones.

Meet Rose & Caramel’s Intensity Bold & Bronzed Self Tanning Mousse in Medium/Dark. This bespoke, buildable self-tanning foam is formulated to replicate a deep bronze, natural-holiday tan, minus the orange tones for a healthy, glowing complexion. Enriched with red undertones to lift and brighten dull skin,  moisture boosting ingredients that flood your skin with hydration,  plus a delicious fruity and fresh scent, this gradual self-tanning mousse is perfect for neutral and cool skin tones that desire a deep bronzed tan.

- Apply one layer for a medium glow or two layers for a deep noticeable tan
- Paraben free
- Cruelty free
- Vegan

product_name: Intensity Bold & Bronzed Self Tanning Mousse
raw_how_to_use:
• Apply the tanning mousse onto clean, dry skin in circular motions with a tanning mitt.
  • Apply one layer for a medium glow or two layers for a deep noticeable tan.
  • Rinse after 6-8 hours.

Tanning Tips: Before tanning:

  • Exfoliate 24 hours before you apply your self tan. Ensuring all old self tan & any dead skin cells are removed!
  • Remove all unwanted hair at least 24hours prior to tanning. Splash cold water over shaved areas to close pores & reduce black dots.
  • Do not apply moisturiser, perfume or makeup at the time of application, these products will act as a barrier across your skin and will prevent tan from developing correctly. After Tanning:
  • Wear dark loose clothing, tight clothing & waist bands can rub away your tan.
  • Use an oil free moisturiser daily to prolong your tan.
raw_description:
A medium/dark, red-toned self-tanning mousse, with zero orange tones.

Meet Rose & Caramel’s Intensity Bold & Bronzed Self Tanning Mousse in Medium/Dark. This bespoke, buildable self-tanning foam is formulated to replicate a deep bronze, natural-holiday tan, minus the orange tones for a healthy, glowing complexion. Enriched with red undertones to lift and brighten dull skin, moisture boosting ingredients that flood your skin with hydration, plus a delicious fruity and fresh scent, this gradual self-tanning mousse is perfect for neutral and cool skin tones that desire a deep bronzed tan.

  • Apply one layer for a medium glow or two layers for a deep noticeable tan
  • Paraben free
  • Cruelty free
  • Vegan

A concealer/foundation hybrid face pen.

With up to 36 hours of customisable coverage, the MAC Cosmetics Studio Fix Every-Wear All-Over Face Pen belongs in your makeup routine. With a lightweight, medium-to-full, buildable coverage that delivers a waterproof, sweat-resistant and natural finish, this easy to control pen is what your routine is missing. Simply half click the pen to conceal and full click to add foundation-level coverage and you’re on your way to brighter, more even and concealed skin.

description:
A lightweight, SPF and skin tint hybrid. 

Keep your skin sunkissed and safe with the Glow Hub Tinted Sunsilk SPF 30. With a lightweight, serum-like consistency, this SPF 30 sunscreen absorbs quickly without clogging the pores to __provide broad-spectrum protection against UVA (the rays that age your skin)__ and __UVB (the rays that burn your skin)__. Thanks to a blend of vitamin E, antioxidant-rich marigold, and green tea, this sunscreen offers __further protection against environmental damage like pollution and free radicals.__ Designed to give the ultimate glow, this sunscreen features a sheer tint that __evens the skin tone__ with light coverage, __helps prevent pigmentation__, and __ensures the skin’s moisture barrier is strong__ and the __skin is healthy__.

raw_description:
A lightweight, SPF and skin tint hybrid.

Keep your skin sunkissed and safe with the Glow Hub Tinted Sunsilk SPF 30. With a lightweight, serum-like consistency, this SPF 30 sunscreen absorbs quickly without clogging the pores to provide broad-spectrum protection against UVA (the rays that age your skin) and UVB (the rays that burn your skin). Thanks to a blend of vitamin E, antioxidant-rich marigold, and green tea, this sunscreen offers further protection against environmental damage like pollution and free radicals. Designed to give the ultimate glow, this sunscreen features a sheer tint that evens the skin tone with light coverage, helps prevent pigmentation, and ensures the skin’s moisture barrier is strong and the skin is healthy.

description:
A range of ultra-bright semi-permanent hair colours.

Switch up your hair colour with the Semi Permanent hair colours from Good Dye Young. With an ultra-creamy formula that deeply conditions while depositing ultra-bright colour, these semi-permanent hair dyes harness the power of a high-quality mask while colouring the hair, so your results feel and look good. - For best results, lighten hair before use

ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearyl Alcohol, Peg 40 Castor Oil, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Octyldodecanol, Proplyene Glycol, Glycerin, Laureth 4, Laureth 23, Polyquaternium 6, Citris Bergamina (Bergamot Oil), Methlchlorisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Extract, Extrait D\u2019heliantus Annuus (Tournesol) May Also Contain: Basic Yellow 40, H C Blue 15, Basic Blue 99, Basic Orange 31, Basic Red 51, Basic Violet 16, Basic Violet 2, Basic Yellow 87, H C Blue 2, H C Red 1, H C Yellow 4."}]
raw_how_to_use:
• To create the best canvas for your color, we recommend lightening your hair using the GDY Lightening Kit.
  • Product will stain, so protect hands, all surfaces and clothing.
  • Apply shea butter, coconut oil or thick conditioner to the hairline to prevent staining.
  • Mix color in the GDY Color Mixing Bowl and use gloves to prevent staining hands.
  • Ensure you strand test first before applying color all over your head.
  • Section and apply directly onto dry hair. Make sure color is fully saturated at every step by combining product through each section.
  • Let the color sit for at least 30 minutes.

  • Rinse with cold water and style as desired with GDY Prime.

  • Allow at least 24 hours before your first shampoo.
  • Rinse hair with cool water each time you wash to minimize fading process.
  • Reduce hair washing days to extend color.

description:
A medium-coverage foundation.

Unlock the secret to your best skin yet with the Luminous Foundation. The water-resistant formula blends seamlessly into skin for a natural, luminous finish that will have them asking about your skincare routine, not your makeup. raw_how_to_use:
• To create the best canvas for your colour, we recommend lightening your hair using our GDY Lightening Kit.
  • Mix colour in the GDY Colour Mixing Bowl and use gloves to prevent staining hands.
  • Ensure you strand test first before applying colour all over your head.
  • Section and apply directly onto dry hair. Make sure colour is fully saturated at every step by combining product through each section.
  • Let the colour sit for at least 30 minutes.

  • Rinse with cold water and style as desired.

  • Allow at least 24 hours before your first shampoo.
  • Rinse hair with cool water each time you wash to minimise fading process.

  • Reduce hair washing days to extend colour.

  • While colour is processing, use a cap to keep the colour damp.
  • Product will stain, so protect hands, all surfaces and clothing.
  • Apply shea butter, coconut oil or thick conditioner to the hairline to prevent staining.

how_to_use: To shape lips, begin by following the natural lip line. Slightly over line cupid’s bow and bottom centre lip for a fuller pout effect.For a natural contoured lip look use a shade 1 to 2 shades deeper than your natural lip colour and or skin tone. Fill in lips with choice of lipstick, lip gloss, or lip balm.Note: You may experience a slight to intense tingle. Apply only within perimeter of lips. If applied on skin, a temporary redness may occur. If any discomfort is present, remove and discontinue use. Keep away from children. Please be aware that safety information may change or vary from time to time. Please refer to the safety information on the product package you receive for the most up-to-date information.

- Waterproof

description:
A hydrating tinted lip gloss. 

Super hydrated, super glossy lips? That sounds like something we want! Maybelline’s Lifter Gloss is infused with hyaluronic acid to not only hydrate the lips but keep them soft and smooth. The glossy formula visibly smooths the lips and enhances the natural contours to create fuller-looking lips with a chic tint. Plus, the XL wand makes it quicker and easier to drench the lips in shine and goodness.

how_to_use: After cleansing skin and applying toner, apply to face and wait 10-20 minutes before removing.Gently pat skin to promote absorption of the remaining essence.Avoid contact with eyes and letting sheet mask to dry completely.
description:
A pack of three brightening sheet masks. 

Really refresh and brighten your skin whenever you use the Holika Holika Pure Essence Mask Sheet Strawberry. Soaked in a strawberry extract, yuzu, and orange-rich blend, these masks work to brighten dark spots prevent tone irregularities and improve the look of scars and post-acne. They also help restore radiance, softness, and elasticity and soothe inflammation while boosting the skin’s immunity. Thanks to their ultra-thin make, they offer tight, close contact for the better and more effective delivery of ingredients so your skin can make the most of these masks.

• After cleansing skin and applying toner, apply to face and wait 10-20 minutes before removing.

how_to_use: Start with clean, dry skin.Apply 1-2 pumps to a brush or sponge and smooth all over the face, neck, and décolletage.
description:
A full-coverage foundation. 

For a flawless base, haul the SOSU by Suzanne Jackson CC Me In. Providing SPF protection as well as a full-coverage finish, this SPF 30 foundation works to brighten, hydrate, plump, and colour-correct the skin for an even complexion. Infused with a variety of skin-loving ingredients, this foundation will quickly become your newest obsession. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

raw_how_to_use:
• Gently apply Brow Primer pencil over filled-in or clean brows.
  • For a subtle, defined look, use it after applying brow powder or brow pencil.
  • Brow Primer also makes a great invisible lip liner when used prior to applying lip stains.
  • Turn your eye shadow into liner by lining the lash line with Brow Primer and using an angled brush to line the eyes.
  • Minimise the appearance of fine lines and crow's feet by applying Brow Primer to outer corners of the eye.

how_to_use: Deep warming massage:Prepare: Splash water on your face and apply a GESKE serum to your face or to the back of the brush. GESKE serums are designed to hydrate and nourish your skin.Power on: Turn on the SmartSonic Pulsation Technology by holding the power button for 2 seconds. Select the desired intensity by using the plus and minus buttons. Next, press the sun icon to turn on the Pore-Opening Deep Warming Technology.Massage: Use the brush to massage the serum into your skin by rubbing the brush in gentle, small circular motions all over your face. Start from the cheek and go over your face, making sure to cover all areas. Do this till the serum is fully absorbed into the skin.Finish: Turn the device off by holding the power button for 2 seconds and rinse the device with water to clean it. Clean your device with a GESKE Device Cleanser after every use.Full facial cleanse:Prepare: Splash water on your face and apply a GESKE cleanser to your face or to the brush. GESKE cleansers gently remove any impurities from deep within the pores.Power on: Turn on the SmartSonic Pulsation Technology by holding the power button for 2 seconds. Select the desired intensity by using the plus and minus buttons.Cleanse: Guide the brush in gentle circular motions over your cheeks, nose and under-eye areas, forehead and chin, taking 15 seconds to cleanse each area. Pay attention to the hairline to thoroughly cleanse any dirt and sweat stuck there.Finish: Rinse your face and brush with water to remove any leftover cleanser and pat your face dry. Clean your device with a GESKE Device Cleanser after every use.
description:
A 6-in-1 heated cleansing brush. 

Indulge your skin in a thorough cleanse with the GESKE Sonic Thermo Facial Brush 6 in 1 Gray. Combining proprietary SmartSonic Pulsation Technology (which delivers over 7,500 pulsations per minute) with soft, hygienic silicone touchpoints, this device uses Ultra Hygienic Deep Cleansing to remove dirt, oil, and makeup residue congesting pores without missing any spots thanks to Flexible Eye-Nose Area Targeted Design. Performing as a cleanser, a heated brush, and a facial massage, this device harnesses the power of Pore-Opening Deep Warming Technology to prime your skin and maximise its ability to absorb serums and creams so active ingredients can penetrate the skin at a deeper level. With Youthful Glow Massage Technology to lift, firm, and tone, this device is your secret to noticeably rejuvenated skin. 

__Don’t forget to download the app__

For video guides, an AI-powered skin scan, expert tips, and a personal guide - download the GESKE German Beauty Tech

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Phthalate-free 

*FYI: This electrical device features a UK (type G) plug*
ingredients: [{"ingredients": ""}]
raw_how_to_use:
Deep warming massage:

Prepare: Splash water on your face and apply a GESKE serum to your face or to the back of the brush. GESKE serums are designed to hydrate and nourish your skin.

Power on: Turn on the SmartSonic Pulsation Technology by holding the power button for 2 seconds. Select the desired intensity by using the plus and minus buttons. Next, press the sun icon to turn on the Pore-Opening Deep Warming Technology.

Massage: Use the brush to massage the serum into your skin by rubbing the brush in gentle, small circular motions all over your face. Start from the cheek and go over your face, making sure to cover all areas. Do this till the serum is fully absorbed into the skin.

Finish: Turn the device off by holding the power button for 2 seconds and rinse the device with water to clean it. Clean your device with a GESKE Device Cleanser after every use.

Full facial cleanse:

Prepare: Splash water on your face and apply a GESKE cleanser to your face or to the brush. GESKE cleansers gently remove any impurities from deep within the pores.

Power on: Turn on the SmartSonic Pulsation Technology by holding the power button for 2 seconds. Select the desired intensity by using the plus and minus buttons.

Cleanse: Guide the brush in gentle circular motions over your cheeks, nose and under-eye areas, forehead and chin, taking 15 seconds to cleanse each area. Pay attention to the hairline to thoroughly cleanse any dirt and sweat stuck there.

Finish: Rinse your face and brush with water to remove any leftover cleanser and pat your face dry. Clean your device with a GESKE Device Cleanser after every use.

Infused with a nourishing blend of murumuru, cupuaçu, and tucuma butter, and essential fatty acids and pro-vitamins, the lips are left feeling and looking soft, conditioned, and moisturised. Its ultra-creamy texture glides seamless on to the lips for a smooth and high-shine finish.

  • Vegan
  • Cruelty-free

Meet your concealer match with the Makeup Revolution IRL Filter Finish Concealer. Ultra-buildable but with a soft matte formulation, feel covered and comfortable without feeling cakey. - 30 shades available
- Crease proof, sweat proof, waterproof

description:
A lightweight, SPF and skin tint hybrid. 

Keep your skin sunkissed and safe with the Glow Hub Tinted Sunsilk SPF 30. With a lightweight, serum-like consistency, this SPF 30 sunscreen absorbs quickly without clogging the pores to __provide broad-spectrum protection against UVA (the rays that age your skin)__ and __UVB (the rays that burn your skin)__. Thanks to a blend of vitamin E, antioxidant-rich marigold, and green tea, this sunscreen offers __further protection against environmental damage like pollution and free radicals.__ Designed to give the ultimate glow, this sunscreen features a sheer tint that __evens the skin tone__ with light coverage, __helps prevent pigmentation__, and __ensures the skin’s moisture barrier is strong__ and the __skin is healthy__.

• Apply generously (4-6 pumps) to face, neck + ears as the last step in your skincare routine after moisturiser in the AM.

  • Reapply throughout the day as needed.
raw_description:
A lightweight, SPF and skin tint hybrid.

Keep your skin sunkissed and safe with the Glow Hub Tinted Sunsilk SPF 30. With a lightweight, serum-like consistency, this SPF 30 sunscreen absorbs quickly without clogging the pores to provide broad-spectrum protection against UVA (the rays that age your skin) and UVB (the rays that burn your skin). Thanks to a blend of vitamin E, antioxidant-rich marigold, and green tea, this sunscreen offers further protection against environmental damage like pollution and free radicals. Designed to give the ultimate glow, this sunscreen features a sheer tint that evens the skin tone with light coverage, helps prevent pigmentation, and ensures the skin’s moisture barrier is strong and the skin is healthy.

description:

Treating the top layer of skin, AHA 30% + BHA 2% Peeling Solution exfoliates for a brighter and clearer complexion. Fighting visible blemishes, continued weekly use reduces pore congestion and fine lines for a bright, youthful complexion.

- Not to be used on sensitive, damaged skin

description:
A hydrating cleanser. 

Supercharged with a hydrating blend of vitamin C, silk amino acids, organic safflower oil, organic moringa oil, astaxanthin, green and white tea extract, the Molecular Silk Amino Hydrating Cleanser gently removes dirt, grime, and makeup without stripping the skin. The silk amino acids provide trace nutrients and help the skin to draw in moisture to hydrate the cells; organic safflower oil and moringa oil work to break down grime and impurities while nourishing; and ethylated l-ascorbic acid brighten dull skin. An all-round skin treat!

raw_how_to_use:
• Use daily AM and PM.

To remove makeup:

  • To remove makeup and sunscreen, massage a dime-sized amount first onto dry skin.
  • Add water and massage again to dissolve daily grime, pollution, sunscreen, and makeup.
  • Rinse and repeat if necessary.

For daily cleansing:

  • Massage onto damp skin.
  • Leave on for 1-2 minutes for extra silkiness.
  • Rinse.

Cover your lips in luxuriously rich, creamy colour with the e.l.f. Cosmetics O Face Satin Lipstick. This long-lasting, satin finish lipstick is enriched with moisturising squalane and marula oil, leaving your lips feeling and looking supple and soft, with a coat of rich colour.

description:
A gently exfoliating, hydrating, gel-to-foam cleanser.

Working to unclog pores and improve skin texture, while gently exfoliating, cleansing and providing hydration, the Skincare By BEAUTY BAY 1% Salicylic Acid + Zinc PCA Cleansing Gel belongs in your skincare routine. Perfect for all skin types, but specifically those with oily or combination skin, this foaming formula contains antioxidant zinc PCA, nourishing sodium PCA and salicylic acid to help reduce the appearance of breakouts by gently exfoliating and unclogging pores.

- Vegan
- Cruelty free
- Made in the UK
- Suitable for all skin types
- Perfect for oily/combination skin types
- Money back promise ([see T&Cs](https://www.beautybay.com/s/money-back-guarantee/))

description:
A two-piece self-tanning bundle. 

Effortlessly create a radiant, custom tan with The Face and The Gradual Duo. Featuring the beauty editor favourite, The Face, and The Gradual, a lightweight gradual tanner. The Face works with your existing skincare routine to transform your moisturiser, serum or oil into a custom self-tanner, while The Gradual works as a daily moisturiser to deliver a natural, buildable colour. Skin is left feeling hydrated and looking luminous with imperfections minimised. 

<u>Set Includes:</u> 
- The Face Illuminating Self-Tanning Drops 30ml - A bottle of tanning face drops to create a natural, buildable tan.
- The Gradual Illuminating Gradual Tan Lotion 250ml – A weightless tanning lotion for the face and body.

product_name: The Face and The Gradual Duo
raw_how_to_use:
The Face

  • Mix 1-4 drops of product into your moisturiser.
  • Apply to the face and wash hands thoroughly.
  • Tan develops in two to four hours.

Guide to glow

  • 2 drops = radiant
  • 4 drops = sun-kissed
  • 8 drops = golden
  • 12 drops = bronzed

The Gradual

  • Apply to clean, dry skin.
  • Rinse hands thoroughly after use.
  • Tan develops within one hour.

description:
A skin brightening and detoxifying serum for breakout prone skin. 

Here for those breakout prone moments, Glow Hub’s Purify & Brighten Super Serum is designed to balance and clarify impurities so you can get your glow back on track. The ultra-lightweight formula helps to brighten the complexion, while added black tea extract helps to detoxify and antioxidant-rich blueberry helps to calm. Added skin-heroes, salicylic acid and white willow bark, work to gently exfoliate the skin and de-clog the pores to lessen the appearance of pesky breakouts. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty free
- Find out which Glow Hub range is right for you <u>__[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/which-glow-hub-range/)__</u> 
- These are the best serums for oily skin – find out everything <u>__[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/best-serums-for-oily-skin/)__</u>

description:
A multi-use, satin-finish lip and cheek liquid.

No look is complete without a By BEAUTY BAY Liquid Cream Blush. Designed with a lightweight, creamy and satin finish, this ultra-pigmented, easy to blend formula uses microsphere powders to create a soft-focus look that can be built up to suit your vibe. Infused with skin loving jojoba and sweet almond oils, this hybrid lip and cheek liquid helps to smooth and nourish the skin (and lips) with a healthy flush of colour, while the cushioned, angled doe foot applicator makes application a dream. It’s time to pick your fave shade, or haul them all…

- Vegan
- PETA certified cruelty free
- Money back promise ([see T&Cs)](https://www.beautybay.com/s/money-back-guarantee/)

• Our super pigmented, liquid cream formula can be used on both the lip and cheeks.

  • Layer on top of our sheer tinted lip balm, for super moisturized, nourished lips.

description:
A dual-ended brow pencil. 

Spice up sparse brows with the MAC Cosmetics Pro Brow Definer 1mm-Tip Brow Pencil. Designed to deliver definition, this dual-ended brow pencil features a fine, 1mm precision tip to fill in the sparse areas of your brows with hair-like strokes, while the spoolie end offers blends for a natural matte finish. Thanks to a waterproof, long-lasting, and colour-true formula, this brow pencil lets you add buildable shade and detail that doesn’t fade, transfer, or smudge for 24 hours.
