description:
A medium-coverage foundation.

Unlock the secret to your best skin yet with the Luminous Foundation. The water-resistant formula blends seamlessly into skin for a natural, luminous finish that will have them asking about your skincare routine, not your makeup. The lightweight, medium coverage foundation helps to instantly mask imperfections, uneven texture and discoloration. Infused with antioxidant vitamin E and soothing seaweed extract to calm and condition the skin, the moisturising foundation hydrates the skin while helping to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

-	Vegan
-	Cruelty free
-	One of our favourite satin finish foundations – find out why __[here](https://www.beautybay.com/edited/best-satin-foundations/)__

description:
A semi-matte foundation. 

Smooth on the perfect canvas for makeup with the TirTir Mask Fit Red Cushion Foundation. Featuring a neutral undertone that adapts exactly to your skin, this no-touch-up-needed foundation cushions the complexion with high coverage, long-lasting comfort, and all-day wear. Enriched with propolis extract and hibiscus flower, this nourishing foundation infuses the skin with intense moisture, while providing protection for a complexion. Combining flawless, semi-matte coverage with skincare benefits, this foundation is a must for an even and naturally radiant complexion. 

- Cruelty-free 
- Suitable for all skin types (including sensitive skin types)

description:
A skincare masking device. 

Take your masking to the next level with the Foreo UFO 2 Device. This innovative, forward-thinking skincare tool is the game-changer you need in your routine. This app-powered device combines Korean-inspired, skin hero masks with fast, warming, and cooling T-Sonic pulsations, as well as LED lights to infuse the benefits deep below the skin’s surface. Pores will be minimised, fine lines reduced, and a brighter, more radiant complexion will be revealed. Pair with your fave UFO mask. 

- Each mask cycle is 90 seconds 
- Download the FOREO app to your phone to tailor your UFO device 
- UFO masks are sold separately 
- Full spectrum LED
- Includes a quick start guide, UFO charger, and acrylic stand

description:
An SPF 30 skin tint. 

Get the glow of a glazed doughnut with the NYX Professional Makeup Buttermelt Glaze Soft Glow Skin Tint + SPF/FPS 30 Foundation. Featuring a sun protection factor of 30, this skin tint instantly melts into the skin to provide a defence against harmful rays with a no-white-cast finish. Thanks to its skincare-based formula (93% to be exact), this mango butter, shea butter, and niacinamide-infused tint leaves behind a lit-from-within glow that’s never greasy. With shades that stretch over up to three skin tones, this buttery fade-resistant formula rebalances tone and promotes healthier-looking skin that glows like a glazed doughnut.

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

Your silky glow starts with Silky Glo. bPerfect’s first ever gradual tanning lotion is here to help you build your bronzed look and help you create a natural looking tan. The light baby powder scent makes the lotion the ultimate finishing touch to your pamper night.

- Suitable for all skin types

Condition and refresh your colour with the Good Dye Young DYEposit. This pigmented treatment is the perfect tool to cleanse and nourish your hair while brightening or enhancing your coloured hair. The easy-to-use formula also helps to build up broken hair bonds, for a healthy, damage-free finish.

  • Cruelty-free
  • Colour lasts up to two weeks

how_to_use: Prep the hair with a heat protector.Starting at 180°C and section and clip the hair into four or more parts.Starting from the back, one inch away from the scalp, take small sections for a more defined wave or larger sections for your beachy undone wave.Comb and clamp the hair and hold for 2-5 seconds.Follow the same method through to the ends repeating throughout the whole head.Once you have finished waving, use your fingertips or a large wide tooth comb and softly brush out your waves to get the look you want.
description:
A 25mm hair waver.

Your mini-wave dreams start here. The Mini Pro Waver 25mm Pink by Mermade Hair
is the ultimate tool for creating beachy, 90s, boho, or glam waves in minutes. Perfect for creating waves in any hair length or texture, the game-changing tool is made with ionic ceramic barrels to protect the hair from damage, while the small barrels create small, defined waves that last. We’re OBSESSED. 

__Features__

- Universal voltage 
- Multiple heat settings
- Advanced heat technology
- Auto shut off after one hour 
- Heat protection glove included 
- Heat resistant soft-touch handle
- 2.5m swivel cord and spring lever 
- High-grade ionic ceramic barrels to protect hair from damage 

*FYI: This electrical device features a UK (type G) plug*
ingredients: [{"ingredients": ""}]
raw_how_to_use:
• Prep the hair with a heat protector.
  • Starting at 180°C and section and clip the hair into four or more parts.
  • Starting from the back, one inch away from the scalp, take small sections for a more defined wave or larger sections for your beachy undone wave.
  • Comb and clamp the hair and hold for 2-5 seconds.
  • Follow the same method through to the ends repeating throughout the whole head.
  • Once you have finished waving, use your fingertips or a large wide tooth comb and softly brush out your waves to get the look you want.

how_to_use: Apply daily as often as needed to clean, dry skin.Allow 2 weeks for pits to adjust from a traditional antiperspirant.
description:
A hydrating, clean stick deodorant.

Great smelling and clean underarms start with the Megababe Rosy Pits Daily Deodorant. Powered by enzymes and extracts, this rose scented, long-lasting formula breaks down odour and absorbs wetness without harmful aluminium or baking soda. Added antioxidant-rich botanicals also give your delicate underarms a boost while willow bark, oatmeal and amino acids combine to restore, soothe and hydrate. The water-based formula glides on like a dream, with no tugging and no sticky residue. Haul pending!

- Cruelty-free
- Free of talc, aluminium,  parabens, phthalates and sulfates

Made with dry skin types in mind, Intensive Moisture Balance is enriched with hyaluronic acid, echinacea, centella asiatica, and aloe vera to lock in vital hydration and deliver a healthy, glowing complexion. Strengthening the skin’s lipid barrier, this rebalancing moisturiser is designed to reduces the appearance of fine lines and keep your skin smooth, soft, and nourished. 

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free
- This is your six-step evening skincare routine for dry skin – find out everything you need to know <u>__[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/evening-skincare-routine-dry-skin/)__</u>

description:
A high-shine lipstick. 

Enjoy the full-pigment luxury of Jeffree Star Cosmetics‘ Shiny Trap Lipstick. Comfortable and creamy, this high-shine lipstick effortlessly glides onto the lips to deliver a long-lasting pigment with a lightweight feel and filter-like finish. Designed to create a breathable barrier on the lips, this shiny lipstick’s lightweight formula is enriched with pomegranate flower extract and jojoba liquid wax to help nourish the lips and provide protection against environmental pollution. Haul for smooth and plump lips! 

- Cruelty-free
- Free of silicones, mineral oil, paraffin, and PEGs

how_to_use: Prep skin with water-based formulas.For dry skin, pair with a hydrating primer. For oily skin, pair with a mattifying primer.Using 1-2 pumps, start by applying in the centre of the face and blend outwards. Pair with a brush for full coverage or a beauty sponge for lighter coverage. Focus on desired areas to build coverage as needed.
description:
A blurring, matte-finish foundation. 

Blurred base? The Anastasia Beverly Hills Impeccable Blurring Second Skin Matte Foundation has you covered. Harnessing the power of Precision Blur Technology, this foundation helps blur, smooth, and noticeably correct uneven tones, discolouration, redness, and breakouts. Weightless and water-based, this foundation blends effortlessly and doesn’t oxidise to deliver medium to full coverage with 12 hours of water-resistant, never-cakey wear. This no-flashback formula leaves behind a second-skin finish that doesn’t melt, slip, separate, settle into lines, or clog the pores. Featuring a blend of skin-loving ingredients like hyaluronic acid and bixa orellana, this foundation blurs pores and imperfections and infuses the skin with moisture with a plumping effect. Available in versatile variety of shades and undertones, this foundation really does check all your boxes. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Free of phthalates, gluten, mineral oil, talc, sulphates, parabens, oil, and fragrance
- Suitable for all skin types (especially oily skin)

raw_how_to_use:
• Prep skin with water-based formulas.
  • For dry skin, pair with a hydrating primer. For oily skin, pair with a mattifying primer.
  • Using 1-2 pumps, start by applying in the centre of the face and blend outwards. Pair with a brush for full coverage or a beauty sponge for lighter coverage. Focus on desired areas to build coverage as needed.
raw_description:
A blurring, matte-finish foundation.

Blurred base? The Anastasia Beverly Hills Impeccable Blurring Second Skin Matte Foundation has you covered. Harnessing the power of Precision Blur Technology, this foundation helps blur, smooth, and noticeably correct uneven tones, discolouration, redness, and breakouts. Weightless and water-based, this foundation blends effortlessly and doesn’t oxidise to deliver medium to full coverage with 12 hours of water-resistant, never-cakey wear. This no-flashback formula leaves behind a second-skin finish that doesn’t melt, slip, separate, settle into lines, or clog the pores. Featuring a blend of skin-loving ingredients like hyaluronic acid and bixa orellana, this foundation blurs pores and imperfections and infuses the skin with moisture with a plumping effect. Available in versatile variety of shades and undertones, this foundation really does check all your boxes.

  • Vegan
  • Cruelty-free
  • Free of phthalates, gluten, mineral oil, talc, sulphates, parabens, oil, and fragrance
  • Suitable for all skin types (especially oily skin)

description:
A correcting concealer for all skin types. 

Here to instantly correct, conceal dark circles, and blur imperfections for up to 12-hours, Clinique’s Even Better All-Over Concealer + Eraser is your next makeup bag must-have. - Non-acnegenic
- Gluten, sulfates, alcohol free
- Sweat and humidity resistant
- Ophthalmologist and dermatologist tested
- Safe for sensitive eyes and contact lens wearers

description:
A colour correcting, brightening concealer. 

We love it when skincare and makeup come together, so we know you’ll be as obsessed with ZOEVA’s Retouch Elixir as us. Designed to brighten, refresh, and conceal the undereye area, the hybrid formula is packed with skincare benefits as well as the medium coverage we all need on a Monday morning. Formulated with caffeine to reduce puffiness and dark circles, vitamin-rich cucumber extract to nourish, and hyaluronic acid to help the skin retain vital moisture for eyes that look and feel early-night-fresh. With a soft, creamy texture, the formula has a blurring effect to smooth the eye area with a chic satin finish that lasts all day. 

- Vegan
- Cruelty free

description:
A two-piece setting duo. 

Set in motion an amazing makeup day with Trigwell Cosmetics’ Seamless Setting Duo. In this set you’ll be greeted with the Mini Powder Puff, that pats away any shine, and reduces the appearance of pores, even in those hard-to-reach areas thanks to its smaller size. You’ll also find the Velvet Setting Powder, an ultra-soft powder with a long-lasting formula that delivers medium coverage, while brightening the complexion and minimising the visibility of pores. This powder also has zero flashback properties, with its mattifying effects revealing an airbrushed finish, so snap away. 

- Free of talc

__Set contains:__

- Velvet Setting Powder in Translucent
- Mini Powder Puff

raw_how_to_use:
Velvet Setting Powder Translucent:

  • Warning: For external use only. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.
  • Dip your Velvet Powder Puff into your Velvet Setting Powder.
  • Before applying the powder directly onto the skin, it is recommended to pat the puff on the back of your hand to remove any excess product and evenly distribute the powder.

Mini Powder Puff:

  • Use to apply powder products to the skin.

Combining flawless coverage with flexible wear, let us introduce you to the bPerfect Chroma Conceal Concealer. Packed with light diffusing technology and concentrated pigments, this concealer delivers nothing but effortless blending and a radiant and creamy finish, with long lasting weightless power, perfect for concealing imperfections and fine lines.

how_to_use: For the last step of morning and evening skin care routine, rub 2-3 drops of the oil on the palm of your hand and gently spread it out according to the skin texture, and then press gently to absorb it.Mixing nutritional cream and essence will provide excellent moisturizing and soothing effects.
description:
A lightweight, nourishing oil.

Skin in need of nourishment? The Black Rice Facial Oil from haruharu wonder has you covered. Infused with antioxidant-rich fermented black rice, this serum protects against free radicals, ultraviolet radiation, and pollution, while encouraging new cell growth. These benefits are further enhanced by a blend of jojoba, sweet almond, sunflower seed, and lavender oil to defend the skin, boost elasticity, and soothe irritation. Working wonders on all skin types, this do-it-oil is your secret to healthy, glowing skin.

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Oil, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Triolein, Heptyl Undecylenate, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Camellia Japonica Seed Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Tocopherol, Glyceryl Dioleate, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil, Linalool, Limonene"}]
raw_how_to_use:
• For the last step of morning and evening skin care routine, rub 2-3 drops of the oil on the palm of your hand and gently spread it out according to the skin texture, and then press gently to absorb it.
  • Mixing nutritional cream and essence will provide excellent moisturizing and soothing effects.

how_to_use: Safe to apply directly on waterline and lid. Build intensity as desired.Remove with eye makeup remover.
description:
A waterproof gel eyeliner. 

For eyeliner looks that make a statement, you need the Clinique High Impact™ Gel Tech Eyeliner. Featuring a super silky gel formula, this waterproof eyeliner glides on smoothly without tugging, pulling, or skipping to deliver intense pigment that doesn’t budge or smudge. Innovative and long-lasting, this gel eyeliner sits on the lids for 24 hours and on the waterline for 12 hours for unstoppable wear and a high-impact finish. 

- Fragrance-free 
- Ophthalmologist and allergy-tested
- Safe for waterline, sensitive eyes, and contact lens wearers

how_to_use: Velvet Setting Powder Translucent:Warning: For external use only. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.Dip your Velvet Powder Puff into your Velvet Setting Powder.Before applying the powder directly onto the skin, it is recommended to pat the puff on the back of your hand to remove any excess product and evenly distribute the powder.Mini Powder Puff:Use to apply powder products to the skin.
description:
A two-piece setting duo. 

Set in motion an amazing makeup day with Trigwell Cosmetics’ Seamless Setting Duo. In this set you’ll be greeted with the Mini Powder Puff, that pats away any shine, and reduces the appearance of pores, even in those hard-to-reach areas thanks to its smaller size. You’ll also find the Velvet Setting Powder, an ultra-soft powder with a long-lasting formula that delivers medium coverage, while brightening the complexion and minimising the visibility of pores. This powder also has zero flashback properties, with its mattifying effects revealing an airbrushed finish, so snap away. 

- Free of talc

__Set contains:__

- Velvet Setting Powder in Translucent
- Mini Powder Puff
ingredients:
[{"ingredients": "Velvet Setting Powder Translucent:
Aluminum starch octenylsuccinate, Mica, Silica, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Dimethicone, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin. May Contain: Iron Oxides (CI 77491, CI 77492, CI77499), FD&C Yellow No.5 (CI 19140), D&C Red No.6 (CI 15850). 
Warning: 
For external use only. If irritation occurs, discontinue use."}]
raw_how_to_use:
Velvet Setting Powder Translucent:

  • Warning: For external use only. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.
  • Dip your Velvet Powder Puff into your Velvet Setting Powder.
  • Before applying the powder directly onto the skin, it is recommended to pat the puff on the back of your hand to remove any excess product and evenly distribute the powder.

Mini Powder Puff:

  • Use to apply powder products to the skin.

how_to_use: Spritz evenly throughout the hair before heat styling.
description:
A multi-tasking hair treatment.

Your hair is going to love you for hauling Beauty Works’ Ten-in-One Miracle Spray. The multi-tasking hair treat works to nourish, repair, and protect the hair during heat styling thanks to an argan and macadamia oil infused formula that helps to replenish lost oils. The spray can also help to eliminate frizz, restore shine, protect from heat, detangle, condition, prevent split ends, repair dry, damaged hair, and enhance the hair’s natural body.

breadcrumbs: [{"name": "Bath & Body", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/bathandbody/"}, {"name": "By BEAUTY BAY", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/beautybay/"}, {"name": "Body Scrubs & Exfoliators", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/beautybay/body-scrubs-exfoliators/"}, {"name": "Body Exfoliating Buff with 10% AHA and Sea Salt ", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/p/beauty-bay/body-exfoliating-buff-with-10-aha-and-sea-salt/"}]
description:
A __brightening__ exfoliating buff for the body.

The By BEAUTY BAY Body Exfoliating Buff leaves skin __refined__ and glow-boosted. Enriched with a match made duo of both chemical and physical exfoliants, it __removes dead skin cells__ and __renews skin__. So you step into the shower dry and flaky. And step out as your smoothest self.

The blend of 10% AHAs __reduces the appearance of bumps and pores__ to give a more even, refined skin texture. And sea salt - the physical exfoliator - helps __remove any dryness and flakiness__ to reveal __smoother, softer, radiant skin__. This buff’s suitable for all skin types, but those with blemish-prone skin in particular will see and feel improvements.

There’s also a powerhouse blend of skin-loving glycerin, coconut oil, and sweet almond oil to __refresh and nourish__ your body. Get ready to buff up your “everything shower”.

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free
- No added fragrance
- Suitable for all bodies and skin types, but particularly those with blemish-prone skin

__In a clinical trial of 22 people, we found...__

- 86% agreed their skin felt __less rough__ and __bumpy__ immediately after first use.​
- 95% said their pores looked __purified__ and __refined__ immediately after first use.​
- 91% said their skin felt __softer__ and __smoother__ immediately after first use.​
- 82% said their skin was __glowing__ after 1 week’s use.​

raw_how_to_use:
• Massage over dry or damp skin and leave for a few minutes before rinsing off with warm water.
  • Use 1-2 times a week.
  • If product gets into eye, rinse well with water. Immediately after use, avoid exposure to direct sunlight. It is recommended that use of the product is followed with the application of an effective sunscreen product.

description:
A medium-coverage foundation.

Unlock the secret to your best skin yet with the Luminous Foundation. The water-resistant formula blends seamlessly into skin for a natural, luminous finish that will have them asking about your skincare routine, not your makeup. The lightweight, medium coverage foundation helps to instantly mask imperfections, uneven texture and discoloration. Infused with antioxidant vitamin E and soothing seaweed extract to calm and condition the skin, the moisturising foundation hydrates the skin while helping to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

-	Vegan
-	Cruelty free
-	One of our favourite satin finish foundations – find out why __[here](https://www.beautybay.com/edited/best-satin-foundations/)__

description:
A full coverage concealer.

Skincare meets makeup with the Glow Hub Under Cover Concealer. Perfect for when your breakouts need some coverage and care, this multi-action concealer delivers long-lasting, high coverage while giving your blemishes a hit of salicylic acid, white willow bark and tea tree, to help control bacteria and improve the appearance of breakouts and redness.

description:
A 4-shade powder blush, bronzer and highlighter palette.

Glowing, radiant skin starts with the By BEAUTY BAY Face Palette. This multi-functional, versatile face palette contains one bronzing or sculpting powder to add warmth and depth, two beautifully soft blushes to add a healthy flush, plus a super shimmery, creamy highlighter to add a touch of radiance. Blendable and buildable, each shade is all you need to customise your best glow yet.

- Vegan
- PETA certified cruelty free
- Money back promise ([see T&Cs](https://www.beautybay.com/s/money-back-guarantee/))

description:
A gently exfoliating, hydrating, gel-to-foam cleanser.

Working to unclog pores and improve skin texture, while gently exfoliating, cleansing and providing hydration, the Skincare By BEAUTY BAY 1% Salicylic Acid + Zinc PCA Cleansing Gel belongs in your skincare routine. Perfect for all skin types, but specifically those with oily or combination skin, this foaming formula contains antioxidant zinc PCA, nourishing sodium PCA and salicylic acid to help reduce the appearance of breakouts by gently exfoliating and unclogging pores.

- Vegan
- Cruelty free
- Made in the UK
- Suitable for all skin types
- Perfect for oily/combination skin types
- Money back promise ([see T&Cs](https://www.beautybay.com/s/money-back-guarantee/))

description:
A hydrating eye treatment.

Banish tired eyes for good with the Skincare By BEAUTY BAY 4.8% Caffeine + Peptide Hydrating Eye Treatment. This hydrating and brightening eye treatment has been formulated with 4.8% caffeine to brighten, peptides to help improve the appearance of dark circles, hyperpigmentation, tiredness and fatigue, and ferulic acid as a protective antioxidant. The lightweight cream texture instantly leaves your skin feeling refreshed, soothed, and moisturised, like you’ve just got your full eight hours.

- FYI: while we transition into our new packaging, you may receive a product in our old style, but don't worry, it's still the same great formula

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free
- Fragrance-free
-	Money back promise ([see T&Cs](https://www.beautybay.com/s/money-back-guarantee/))

A liquid lipstick. 

Lock your lips into comfortable colour that commits when you haul the Urban Decay Vice Lip Bond. Designed to deliver saturated colour for up to 16 hours, this transfer-proof and smudge-resistant formula applies effortlessly to moisturise the lips and provide kiss-proof colour. - Vegan

description:
A 24-hour longwearing multi-use concealer with a brush applicator.

Ready for quick, easy concealer coverage? Introducing the Urban Decay Stay Naked Quickie Concealer. Infused with vitamin E for long-lasting skin hydration, this lightweight multi-use concealer with a brush applicator covers acne, dark circles, under eyes, and hyperpigmentation for up to 24 hours with a natural finish, allowing for fast, finger-free application that’s suitable for targeted or all-over usage. A must-have for the makeup obsessives!

raw_description:
Lightweight and long lasting, a lip colour that has all the bold style of its creator.

Innovatively formulated to offer stay all day, opaque colour, Velour Liquid Lipstick is the perfect way to create a flawless pout in minutes. Built upon the success of Jeffree Star himself, the impressive quick dry finish offers everything you want from a liquid lipstick and more, meaning you never have to settle for anything less than the best.

  • Vegan

  • One of our favourite matte lipsticks – find out why here
  • This beauty product has over 1,000 reviews – find out why everyone loves it here
  • Jeffree Star approved! BEAUTY BAY are an approved retailer of Jeffree Star Cosmetics

how_to_use: Can be worn alone, mixed with or on top of makeup.Pump product onto your fingers, brush or sponge and blend into the skin.
description:
A tinted primer. 

When skincare and makeup meet, you get Glow Hub’s Baby Beam Airbrush Primer. This multi-purpose skincare/makeup hybrid can be worn as a primer, skin tint, or highlighter as it blurs imperfections to reveal a glowing complexion. Formulated with a nourishing blend of glycerin, hyaluronic acid, squalane, and vitamins A and E, this lightweight primer also hydrates the skin and provides antioxidant protection. Wear by itself, mixed with or on top of makeup for a faux filter-like finish. 

- Cruelty-free

how_to_use:
Wear alone as an eyeshadow or eye liner, or layer on top of Chromaddiction Matte and Chromaddiction Shimmer to intensify your look.For optimum staying power, apply over an eye primer and as final layer of makeup. 
Shake well before use.Top tip: For more precise details, use our tapered brush tip applicator to draw fine lines.
description:
A glitter eye and paint liner.

Get your glitter on with the HALF MAGIC Glitterpill Eye Paint & Liner. This airy, buildable multidimensional glitter gel is built with varied glitter sizes and hues to maximise reflectivity to give you the most glamourous glitter look you’ve ever seen. We’re obsessed!

- Vegan
- Cruelty free
- Transfer and smudge proof 
- Fall-out proof glitter (Up to 12 hours)
- Eye safety tested

• Wear alone as an eyeshadow or eye liner, or layer on top of Chromaddiction Matte and Chromaddiction Shimmer to intensify your look.

  • For optimum staying power, apply over an eye primer and as final layer of makeup. Shake well before use.

how_to_use:
Step 1: Define your brow by creating hairlike strokes with the thin top edge of the pencil.
Step 2: Using the wide flat side, shade in sparse areas in the middle of your brow.
Step 3: Blend and comb brow hair for a nano brow look that lasts all day.

description:
A dual-edged brow pencil.

Draw on the nano-bladed look with the NYX Professional Makeup Blade & Shade, Nano Brow Mechanical Pencil. With a dual-edged design, this brow pencil features a sharp tip for blade-thin, hair-like strokes, while its flat edge side can be used to fill in and add shade. Offering a tug and skip-free application, this pencil smoothly glides on to deliver brow-defining pigments that last and stay smudge and transfer-resistant for up to 16 hours. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

breadcrumbs: [{"name": "Makeup", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/makeup/"}, {"name": "Danessa Myricks Beauty", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/danessamyricksbeauty/"}, {"name": "Tinted Moisturisers", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/danessamyricksbeauty/tinted-moisturisers/"}, {"name": "Yummy Skin Serum Tint", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/p/danessa-myricks-beauty/yummy-skin-serum-tint/"}]
description:
A nourishing skin tint. 

Indulge in a post-facial glow, without the hassle of a facial when you use the Danessa Myricks Beauty Yummy Skin Serum Tint. Made with a hydrating serum complex that’s enriched with vegan squalane and vegan collagen peptides, this skin tint provides intense hydration (to restore and retain moisture) and a seamless blurring effect that smooths uneven textures and fine lines. An infusion of ceramides offers strengthening and replenishing properties to protect the skin barrier, while cactus extract (an antioxidant booster) soothes and moisturises the skin with a sheer pigment finish to balance the skin tone. Your flawless canvas awaits you.  

- Vegan 
- Cruelty free

description:
A 6-in-1 cooling, depuffing device. 

Make under-eye puffiness a thing of the past with the GESKE Warm & Cool Eye Energizer 6 in 1. Harnessing the power of proprietary SmartSonic Pulsation Technology and advanced Energizing Eye Cooling and Relaxing Eye Warming technologies, this device delivers 11, 000 sonic pulsations per minute to significantly improve the absorptions and efficacy of your eye creams and serums. Relaxing Eye Warming Technology stimulates uniform heating of the surface to 45°C / 113 F for 90 seconds to calm tired eyes, promote blood flow, and speed up the delivery of nutrients and oxygen. 

High Efficiency Depuffing System (GESKE’s proprietary Energizing Eye Cooling Technology) helps cool the skin to 19°C / 66 F in 15 seconds per eye to revitalise, refresh, and compress the blood vessels to lessen the look of dark circles, minimise eye swelling, and depuff. With the help of SmartSonic Pulsation Technology, this device provokes special acupoints under each eye with specially designed silicone massage patterns. Youthful Glow Massage Technology works hard to alleviate the tension in the eye muscles and rebuilds elasticity to combat the forming of fine lines. This all-in-one solution device belongs in your skincare routine. 

__Don’t forget to download the app__

For video guides, an AI-powered skin scan, expert tips, and a personal guide - download the GESKE German Beauty Tech

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Phthalate-free 

*FYI: This electrical device features a UK (type G) plug*

raw_how_to_use:
Relaxing warming eye massage:

  • Start with a clean, makeup-free face.
  • Turn on the SmartSonic Pulsation Technology by holding the power button for 2 seconds. Select the desired intensity by using the plus and minus buttons. Next, press the sun icon to turn on the Relaxing Eye Warming Technology.
  • Place the device on each eye for 90 seconds. Then, flip the device over and gently glide the massaging ridges in small half circles under the eye towards the temple.
  • Turn the device off by holding the power button for 2 seconds and rinse the device with water to clean. Clean your device with a GESKE device cleanser after every use.

Refreshing cooling eye massage:

  • Make sure your face is clean and free of make-up.
  • Turn on the SmartSonic Pulsation Technology by holding the power button for 2 seconds. Select the desired intensity by using the plus and minus buttons. Next, press the snowflake icon to turn on the Energizing Eye Cooling Technology.
  • Place the device on each eye for 15 seconds. The Energizing Eye Cooling Technology reduces swelling around the eye by constricting blood vessels for a short while.
  • Turn the device off by holding the power button for 2 seconds and rinse the device with water to clean. Clean your device with a GESKE device cleanser after every use.

how_to_use: Flip the reeds: two times in the first week, then whenever you want for it to smell stronger.Use the right number of reeds: premium bamboo reeds efficiently absorb and disperse aroma quicker than rattan reeds, therefore we would recommend using 4 or 5 reeds initially, then add more reeds as required. When using natural rattan reeds, use all reeds for the first week, then remove as required.Direct sunlight: try Not To! Essential oils are fragile. Harsh sunlight will affect their delicate scent.

Bring sweet-smelling, serenity into your home with the Psychic Sisters’ Crystal Infused Reed Diffuser in Amethyst. Perfect for enriching your environment, these reed diffusers are infused with amethyst and scented with citrus and rosemary. Carefully crafted to enhance your well-being, this reed diffuser uses the power of gemstones to elevate your living space. 

- Cruelty-free

raw_how_to_use:
• Flip the reeds: two times in the first week, then whenever you want for it to smell stronger.
  • Use the right number of reeds: premium bamboo reeds efficiently absorb and disperse aroma quicker than rattan reeds, therefore we would recommend using 4 or 5 reeds initially, then add more reeds as required. When using natural rattan reeds, use all reeds for the first week, then remove as required.
  • Direct sunlight: try Not To! Essential oils are fragile. Harsh sunlight will affect their delicate scent.

description:
An IPL hair removal device. 

Rid yourself of hair, one blast at a time using the Silk'n SILK’N 7. Adding a new meaning to long-lasting, hair-free skin, this device delivers instant and very visible results after just 2 weeks with up to 22.2% hair reduction after the first session. Powered by award-winning and patented eHPL™ technology, this device harnesses Galvanic energy to open the pores and let Optical energy (the light energy) optimally target hair follicles at the root painlessly.

This device offers dual energy with 100% power by using two lamps to maximise coverage and intensity to reduce hair as efficiently as possible with optimal control of power output. To cater to a variety of skin tones, this device’s Silk’n AutoAdapt technology feature reads skin tones before each flash. Plus, its patented 360° rotatable head gives you six adjustable angles that let you reach those pesky harder-to-reach areas, leaving (all of you) silky smooth and hair-free. Did we mention that it’s got the largest spot size in the world? Yep, we’re just as impressed as you are. 

__Features:__

- eHPL Galvanic & Optical energy
- Up to 120 light pulses p/m
- Light pulses 600K
- Surface 1-5cm²
- Rotatable head (360°)
- Suitable for face and body 
- Hair reduction <92%*
- Can pulse or glide

__Comes with:__

- 3 attachments 
- Luxury case
- Extension cord (3m)‌
- Razor

*FYI: This electrical device features a UK (type G) plug*

description:
A liquid lip balm. 

Lock your lips into the plumping nourishment of the Jeffree Star Cosmetics Liquid Lip Balm. Combining a propriety blend of plant extracts with a natural peptide, this restorative lip balm helps soothe, smooth, and moisturise the lips. An infusion of hyaluronic spheres helps plump the lips and work to minimise the look of fine lines and wrinkles, while hydrating cupuacu seed butter and vitamin-rich olive fruit oil help nourish the lips and provide antioxidant protection. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Free of PEG, parabens, D5, silicone, talc, and sulphates

raw_how_to_use: • Apply to lips as often as needed to moisturize and plump lips.
raw_description:
A liquid lip balm.

Lock your lips into the plumping nourishment of the Jeffree Star Cosmetics Liquid Lip Balm. Combining a propriety blend of plant extracts with a natural peptide, this restorative lip balm helps soothe, smooth, and moisturise the lips. An infusion of hyaluronic spheres helps plump the lips and work to minimise the look of fine lines and wrinkles, while hydrating cupuacu seed butter and vitamin-rich olive fruit oil help nourish the lips and provide antioxidant protection.

  • Vegan
  • Cruelty-free
  • Free of PEG, parabens, D5, silicone, talc, and sulphates

how_to_use: Use alone for a highly pigmented eye, lip, or cheek or as a base for powder products.Can also be used as a waterproof base for eyeshadows or concealers.
description:
A hybrid, multi-use cream colour. 

Want waterproof, smudge-proof makeup that beats the test of time? You need the Danessa Myricks Beauty Colorfix Matte Refresh. Designed to prolong makeup wear-time and be endurant, this high-performance cream colour works to enhance pigment with a rich colour payoff and dimension. Thanks to its smudge-resistant and waterproof formula, this quick-drying cream colour performs well in a variety of temperatures for long, waterproof wear or to enhance pigment vibrancy. Offering versatile wear, this cream colour works well with wax, silicone, and oil-based products so you can layer it under cream or powder eyeshadows for a powerful pop of colour or mix it with complexion products to create a customisable shade or for the ultimate waterproof base. 

- Cruelty-free

description:
A refreshing, hydrating mist for all skin types.  

Created with a blend of fragrant herbal extracts and rosewater, it lightly refreshes skin whilst boosting hydration and relieving dehydrated, tight complexions. Mist it over your moisturiser for a hydration boost or use it to set makeup. It can even be used on dry hair as a light moisturising mist.

- Find why you need Mario Badescu's facial sprays in your routine <u>__[here](https://www.beautybay.com/edited/mario-badescu-facial-spray/)__</u>
- Our beauty editor used this to prep her skin for her wedding – find out more <u>__[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/wedding-skincare-regime/)__</u>
- We've given the lowdown on the best Mario sprays for each skin type __<u>[here](https://www.beautybay.com/edited/mario-badescu-sprays/)</u>__

A volumising mascara.

how_to_use: Learn how to use the 5-in-1 Builder Gel hereAfter nail prep, apply the Builder Gel and cure under a UV lamp for 2 mins or LED lamp for 60 secs. Top tip: apply a base coat first if using a coloured Builder Gel.Pop on your MyGel shade of choice or apply more Builder Gel in thin layers to build up strength, curing for 60 secs each time.Apply another layer of Builder Gel to top it off and finish with a Top Coat and cure.Remove any sticky residue with Mylee’s Prep and Wipe on a Lint Free Wipe and voila, stronger nails!
description:
A strengthening gel polish.

Natural nails keep breaking? Mylee's got you covered! This 5-in-1 Builder Gel will help strengthen your natural nails and can be used to lengthen them by up to 1cm. This thick gel polish is loved and used by professionals and beauty enthusiasts alike and will help you to achieve durable gel nails for up to three weeks wear time without the price tag, minus the chipping, smudging, nicks or dents.
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Acrylates Copolymer, Polymethyl Methacrylate, Polyethylene Terephthalate, Trimethylolpropane Triacrylate, Dimethicone, Microcrystalline Wax, Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), [May Contain (+/-): D&C Red No. 30 (CI 73360), Iron Oxides (CI 77491, CI 77492)]"}]
raw_how_to_use:
• Learn how to use the 5-in-1 Builder Gel here

  • After nail prep, apply the Builder Gel and cure under a UV lamp for 2 mins or LED lamp for 60 secs. Top tip: apply a base coat first if using a coloured Builder Gel.
  • Pop on your MyGel shade of choice or apply more Builder Gel in thin layers to build up strength, curing for 60 secs each time.
  • Apply another layer of Builder Gel to top it off and finish with a Top Coat and cure.
  • Remove any sticky residue with Mylee’s Prep and Wipe on a Lint Free Wipe and voila, stronger nails!

Say hello to 12 hours of flawless wear with the MAC Cosmetics Studio Fix Powder Plus Foundation. how_to_use: Prep skin with water-based formulas.For dry skin, pair with a hydrating primer. For oily skin, pair with a mattifying primer.Using 1-2 pumps, start by applying in the centre of the face and blend outwards. Pair with a brush for full coverage or a beauty sponge for lighter coverage. Focus on desired areas to build coverage as needed.
description:
A blurring, matte-finish foundation. 

Blurred base? The Anastasia Beverly Hills Impeccable Blurring Second Skin Matte Foundation has you covered. Harnessing the power of Precision Blur Technology, this foundation helps blur, smooth, and noticeably correct uneven tones, discolouration, redness, and breakouts. Weightless and water-based, this foundation blends effortlessly and doesn’t oxidise to deliver medium to full coverage with 12 hours of water-resistant, never-cakey wear. This no-flashback formula leaves behind a second-skin finish that doesn’t melt, slip, separate, settle into lines, or clog the pores. Featuring a blend of skin-loving ingredients like hyaluronic acid and bixa orellana, this foundation blurs pores and imperfections and infuses the skin with moisture with a plumping effect. Available in versatile variety of shades and undertones, this foundation really does check all your boxes. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Free of phthalates, gluten, mineral oil, talc, sulphates, parabens, oil, and fragrance
- Suitable for all skin types (especially oily skin)

• Prep skin with water-based formulas.

how_to_use: Twist the bottom of the tube to saturate the sponge applicator with product.Apply directly onto the skin surface.Use your favourite brush or sponge to blend the product into your skin.Repeat the process to build coverage.
description:
A creamy concealer.

Makeup meets skincare with the Nabla Re-Generation Concealer. The creamy concealer effectively reduces the appearance of dark circles and covers skin imperfections, thanks to the formula packed with skin-loving, functional ingredients day after day to make skin look more toned, lifted and regenerated. Each shade melts seamlessly into skin, giving it a blurred, radiant finish that lasts all day, while the handy twist pen and sponge applicator distributes the perfect amount of product on the face with no waste, making it perfect for touch-ups during the day.

description:
A brow styling wax. 

Give your brows a boost with Anastasia Beverly Hills’ Brow Freeze® Extreme Hold Laminated-Look Sculpting Wax. The clear formula lifts, tames, and sculpts the hairs into place for customisable looks that won’t feel stiff, or flake. Perfect for creating that feathered look, the easy-to-use wax provides long-lasting hold and helps to tame unruly brows for full-bodied brows that last all day.

raw_how_to_use:
• Gently pick up a small amount of product using a spoolie.
  • On clean brows, brush through the brow using upward motions and gently pressing down as you go.
  • Continuously brush them in the desired direction as it sets.
  • To maintain optimal appearance and efficacy, cap must remain tightly closed at all times when not in use.
  • For thicker, untamed brows use a little more product for extra hold.

description:
A loose face powder.

Micro-fine, lightweight and translucent, what more can we ask for in a powder? The  Danessa Myricks Beauty Evolution Powder was developed and tested with tv, film and flash photography in mind. Working as both a finishing and setting powder, the surface refining powder helps to blur the skin, minimising the appearance of texture and fine lines, while absorbing oil and reducing shine. No makeup routine is complete without it.

description:
A 26” braid extension. 

Take your hair game to great lengths with the Lullabellz Grande 26'' Braid. From their best-selling Grande range, this braid uses premium synthetic fibres to create a bold and silky braid that flows and seamlessly blends into your natural hair. A wraparound strand lets you conceal any pins or clips for an undetectable finish. A high-grade braid? Yes please. 

- Suitable for all hair types
- Weight: 154g
- Length: 26”
- Includes hair grips and clear elastics
ingredients: [{"ingredients": ""}]
raw_how_to_use:
• To ensure a super easy application, the product has a fuss-free hairband base and pre-sectioned hair with clear elastics for ease and convenience when styling.
  • Tie hair into a pony and gel back any loose bits of hair.
  • Tie the hair piece around your pony.
  • Separate the shorter synthetic hair piece from the longer ones.
  • Split your hair into 3 sections and braid it with the synthetic hair.
  • Secure braid with clear elastic.
  • Comb through the shorter piece and wraparound pony.
  • Secure with grips.

Care Instructions:

  • Wash with hair extensions shampoo and conditioner and leave to dry naturally.
  • Store in hair extension hanger to avoid tangling.
  • Use a soft bristle brush when brushing/detangling.
  • Heat resistant up to 180 degrees.
  • Not suitable to be completely re-styled into a new style.

description:
A brow mousse.

For a full, fluffy brow, you need the Maybelline Superfluff Brow Mousse. Featuring a unique, airy, volumising formula, this brow mousse creates a soft, full-brow look with all-day wear (up to 16 hours). Thanks to its fluff brush, this mousse evenly coats and fluffs each hair and can be used to build volume that’s flake-free and never stiff. What more could you ask for?

description:
A multi-use pressed powder.

With a soft focus finish that blurs lines and imperfections, the Melt Cosmetics Glazed Skin powder belongs in your makeup routine. Super natural, lightweight and radiant, this multi-use powder that can be used on top of foundation or worn alone for more youthful fresh looking skin. With a formula made up of moisturising jojoba oil and vitamin E, plus oil-balancing mineral clay, this powder needs to be on your radar.

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free

raw_how_to_use:
• Use as a setting powder by gently dusting over foundation using a fluffy brush, for a glazed skin finish.
  • Pat and buff onto the skin starting from the centre of the face outward using circular motions.
  • For a soft sun-kissed glow, sweep your matching shade across the high points of the face, use a slightly deeper shade around the forehead, under the cheekbones, and around your chin and nose.

description:
A skin tint. 

Swipe on a sheer layer of ‘your skin but better’ with the Truth Tint Skin from Made By Mitchell. Designed to create a protective layer over the skin that locks in moisture, this water-based skin tint applies effortlessly and blends seamlessly to add a hydrating and conditioning veil of colour to the complexion with sheer to buildable coverage. Offering a dewy and healthy glow, this skin tint is what your makeup collection is missing. 

- Cruelty-free 
- Suitable for all skin types

description:
A hydrating hybrid lip gloss and stain.

Hit your lips with the tint and hydration of the NYX Professional Makeup Lip IV Hydrating Gloss Stain Lip Gloss. Made with a moisturising medley of magnesium, vitamin B12, and coconut water, this gloss leaves the lips with intense hydration with a sensorial, refreshing feel. Infused with lightweight but rich pigments, this formula can be built up or down to achieve a sheer wash of lip-enhancing colour to an intense wet-shine look that’s always even and natural-looking. 

- Cruelty-free

Use with caution if taking dietary supplements or using other products containing Vitamin A.When first starting to use this serum, do not use daily, as your skin needs to build a tolerance to the retinol.Use a couple of times a week at first and then build up to daily use.Apply 1 to 2 drops directly onto the skin.Use as part of your PM skincare routine.Follow with SPF the morning after.
description:
A set of two retinol-based serums. 

For skin that is hydrated, smooth and clear, make an appointment with By BEAUTY BAY's Renew + Smooth Serum 2 x 45ml. In this duo you’ll find two skin-loving serums that help to improve the appearance of pigmentation, dark spots, fine lines, and wrinkles thanks to a 0.2% retinol complex. While added peptides infuse the skin with much-needed moisture, helping to improve the skin’s clarity. Perfect for first-time retinol users, these serums will quickly become your newest obsessions.

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Suitable for all skin types 
- PSA: You may recognise this product as the By BEAUTY BAY SkinHit 0.2% Retinol Complex Serum with Retinol and Peptides, it’s still the same formula you know and love, just with a new look
- Money back promise [(see T&Cs)](https://www.beautybay.com/s/money-back-guarantee/) 

__Set contains:__

- 2 x Renew + Smooth Serum
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Aqua (Water), Propanediol, Polysorbate 20, Retinol, Acetyl Hexapeptide-1, Sodium Citrate, Xanthan Gum, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium EDTA, 1,2-Hexanediol, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, BHT, BHA."}]
raw_how_to_use:
• Warnings – This product contains Vitamin A. It is not recommended to use in pregnancy and while breastfeeding. Use with caution if taking dietary supplements or using other products containing Vitamin A.

  • When first starting to use this serum, do not use daily, as your skin needs to build a tolerance to the retinol.
  • Use a couple of times a week at first and then build up to daily use.
  • Apply 1 to 2 drops directly onto the skin.
  • Use as part of your PM skincare routine.
  • Follow with SPF the morning after.

description:
A multi-use powder foundation. 

Enjoy custom coverage with the Estee Lauder Double Wear Stay-in-Place Matte Powder Foundation SPF10. Performing as a foundation and setting powder, this multi-use powder’s versatile and weightless formula works to minimise the look of pores and manage oil and shine. Featuring SPF 10, this powder delivers a defence against sun damage, while providing up to 12 hours of waterproof, sweat and humidity-resistant wear without clogging the pores or drying the skin. As well as staying colour-true, this silky-smooth formula offers flexibility with a sheer to full coverage finish that’s matte for long-lasting luxury when it comes to your base. 

- Oil-free
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Boron Nitride, Polymethylsilsesquioxane, Octyldodecyl Stearoyl Stearate, Silica, Calcium Silicate, Isostearyl Neopentanoate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Dimethicone, Methicone, Phenyl Trimethicone, Talc, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Trimethylsiloxysilicate, Methyl Methacrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Lauroyl Aspartate, Caprylyl Glycol, Hexylene Glycol, Zinc Stearate, Isopropyl Titanium Triisostearate, Phenoxyethanol, [+/- Mica, Titanium Dioxide (Ci 77891), Iron Oxides (Ci 77491), Iron Oxides (Ci 77492), Iron Oxides (Ci 77499), Bismuth Oxychloride (Ci 77163), Carmine (Ci 75470), Chromium Hydroxide Green (Ci 77289), Chromium Oxide Greens (Ci 77288)]"}]
product_name: Double Wear Stay-in-Place Matte Powder Foundation SPF10
raw_how_to_use:
How to apply:

  • Customise your coverage with a flip of the two-sided applicator.
  • Use the sponge side to apply the foundation for full coverage.
  • Use the velvety side for medium coverage.
  • Wet applicator for sheer coverage.
  • Maximize your matte look by applying liquid Double Wear Stay-in-Place Makeup first, then the Powder Makeup.

How to find your undertone:

  • Undertone is the way your bare skin looks and behaves. Which one sounds most like you?
  • Cool (C) undertones:Bare skin has a rosy tone and burns easily in the sun.
  • Neutral (N) undertones:Bare skin is more even toned, not too pink or golden.
  • Warm (W) undertones:Bare skin has a golden or olive tone and tans easily in the sun.

description:
A temporary, brush on hair colour brush.

Effortlessly paint away root regrowth and conceal greys in one stroke with the Josh Wood Colour Blending Brush. This easy-to-use, brush-on temporary colour brush is ideal for delivering instant and natural-looking coverage (that lasts up to three washes), in between colouring sessions.

raw_how_to_use:
• Apply to damp hair.
  • Shake well before use.
  • Press the button to load the colour - only a small amount needed to cover roots.
  • Lift hair away from the scalp and paint over regrowth using the brush tip.
  • Blow dry to set colour and style as normal.

description:
A flavoured body butter. 

Treat your skin to the hydration it deserves by hauling Tree Hut’s Whipped Body Butter in Watermelon. Airy and lightweight, this body butter absorbs quickly into the skin to deeply nourish, enhance elasticity, soften, and retain moisture with a  blend of watermelon, vegan collagen, and shea butter. This whipped formula also provides a gentle exfoliation, and promote the look of smoother and firmer skin. Scented with juicy bursts of watermelon, lemon zest, and raspberry cotton candy, this body butter helps you achieve soft and sweet-smelling skin.

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free
- Free of alcohol, parabens, sulphate, formaldehyde donors, and gluten

Airy and lightweight, this body butter absorbs quickly into the skin to deeply nourish, enhance elasticity, soften, and retain moisture with a blend of watermelon, vegan collagen, and shea butter. This whipped formula also provides a gentle exfoliation, and promote the look of smoother and firmer skin. Scented with juicy bursts of watermelon, lemon zest, and raspberry cotton candy, this body butter helps you achieve soft and sweet-smelling skin.

  • Vegan
  • Cruelty-free
  • Free of alcohol, parabens, sulphate, formaldehyde donors, and gluten

description:
A matte lipstick. 

Coat your lips in comfortable colour by adding the Nabla Beyond Blurry Lipstick to your basket. With a bullet tip for a seamless application, this lipstick’s balmy consistency glides smoothly along the lips to deliver __lip-flattering and blurring colour__ with a __supple matte finish and comfortable feel__. Offering a smooth velvet look and feel, this lipstick delivers buildable coverage that can be layered for pigment intensity or built down for a sheer flawless flush. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

raw_how_to_use:
• For An Effortlessly Blurry Pout: Apply Beyond Blurry directly on the lips and saturate, focusing on the centre, for an amazingly blurred and soft-focused pout.
  • For An Airbrushed Ethereal Look: If you want next-level blurred lips, apply Beyond Blurry and use your fingertips to soften the edges on your cupid’s bow.
  • For a Classic Glam Look: Line lips with your favourite Close-Up Lip Shaper, then fill in with Beyond Blurry Lipstick. For a tone-enhancing and blurred effect, apply one coat. Apply more to intensify colour and finish as desired.
raw_description:
A matte lipstick.

Coat your lips in comfortable colour by adding the Nabla Beyond Blurry Lipstick to your basket. With a bullet tip for a seamless application, this lipstick’s balmy consistency glides smoothly along the lips to deliver lip-flattering and blurring colour with a supple matte finish and comfortable feel. Offering a smooth velvet look and feel, this lipstick delivers buildable coverage that can be layered for pigment intensity or built down for a sheer flawless flush.

  • Vegan
  • Cruelty-free

how_to_use: Apply onto under eyes and/or face with the wand applicator, then blend using a brush, fingers, or a makeup sponge.Blend or build to desired coverage and look.
description:
A concealer that hydrates, lifts, and brightens the skin. 

Craving that natural, radiant finish? The M·A·C Cosmetics Studio Radiance 24HR Luminous Lift Concealer is here to answer all your beauty wishes. This serum-infused, weightless formula melts into the skin for 24 hours of buildable coverage and immediate hydration. It’s infused with 31 (yep, __31__) hydrating, plumping, and illuminating skincare ingredients, including niacinamide, vitamin C, and hyaluronic acid, to diminish the appearance of dark circles and create a lifted finish. With an effortless application and a seamless blend, nailing your base has never been easier.

Hit your lips with the tint and hydration of the NYX Professional Makeup Lip IV Hydrating Gloss Stain Lip Gloss. breadcrumbs: [{"name": "Fragrance", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/fragrance/"}, {"name": "Sol de Janeiro", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/soldejaneiro/"}, {"name": "Fragrances", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/soldejaneiro/fragrances/"}, {"name": "SOL Cheirosa \u201862 Eau de Parfum ", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/p/sol-de-janeiro/sol-cheirosa-62-eau-de-parfum/"}]
description:
A creamy, warm, gourmand fragrance.

Feel the warmth of Rio sunshine all year round with the Sol De Janeiro SOL Cheirosa ‘62 Eau de Parfum. Enriched with delicious, irresistible gourmand notes grounded with soft florals and creamy sandalwood, plus notes of salted caramel, vanilla bean and rich almond, this scent is about to be your new favourite.

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free

- Fragrance Family: warm gourmand
- Top Notes: pistachio, almond
- Mid Notes: jasmine petals, heliotrope
- Dry Notes: vanilla, salted caramel, sandalwood
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Alcohol Denat., Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water, Eau), Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, Coumarin, Limonene, Benzyl Alcohol, Hydroxycitronellal, CI 15985 (Yellow 6), CI 14700 (Red 4), CI 19140 (Yellow 5)"}]
raw_how_to_use:
• To enhance the warmth of this delicious gourmand fragrance, apply to pulse points such as wrists, elbows, neck—even the backs of your knees.
  • But note that if you spray on your wrists, don’t rub them together, as this can disrupt the notes in the scent.

description:
A multi-chromatic micro eye pencil.

Take your eye looks to new levels with the Danessa Myricks Beauty Infinite Chrome Pencils. Each shade features a dual, colour-shifting finish that transforms in different lights, and blends and smudges over the eye with a creamy texture. With a precise micro tip, this pencil is perfect for creating precise lines that can also be blended with ease.

breadcrumbs: [{"name": "Skincare", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/skincare/"}, {"name": "Bioderma", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/bioderma/"}, {"name": "Face Wash & Cleansers", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/bioderma/facewashcleansers/"}, {"name": "Sensibio Cleansing Micellar Water Sensitive Skin", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/p/bioderma/sensibio-cleansing-micellar-water-sensitive-skin/"}]
description:
Cleansing micellar water. 

Free your complexion from makeup and pollution with the Bioderma Sensibio Cleansing Micellar Water Sensitive Skin. Formulated with micelles and biomimetic active ingredients, this soothing micellar water gently removes impurities, makeup, and pollution particles without disturbing the skin’s balance or clogging the pores. Aside from preserving the skin’s natural, protective film, this no-rinse-needed micellar water also soothes the skin and prevents inflammation with a complex of three biomimetic soothing sugars. 

- Fragrance-free
- Suitable for very dry, irritated, and atopic-sensitive skin types
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Aqua/Water/Eau, Peg-6 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Fructooligosaccharides, Mannitol, Xylitol, Rhamnose, Cucumis Sativus (Cucumber) Fruit Extract, Propylene Glycol, Cetrimonium Bromide, Disodium Edta. [Bi 446]"}]
product_name: Sensibio Cleansing Micellar Water Sensitive Skin
raw_how_to_use:
• Morning and/or evening – 7 days a week.
  • Soak a cotton pad with Sensibio H2O.
  • Gently cleanse and/or remove make-up from your face and eyes.
  • No rinsing required.

- Transfer, smudge, and crease proof

how_to_use: For best results, apply to fresh, clean, dry skin after you have cleansed.Close your eyes and spritz liberally all-over dry skin.Apply 2-3 times per week for a radiant glow.Suitable for the face, neck and decolletage.
description:
Tanning water. 

Spray your way to a sunkissed, summer-ready tan with the Bellamianta Summer Infused Tanning Water. Formulated with hyaluronic acid and grapefruit, blueberry, pineapple, and melon extracts (ingredients rich with vitamins A, C, E, B1, B2, and B6), this tanning water improves the condition of the skin to leave it softened and sunkissed. An infusion of cucumber extract (a good source of vitamin C, carotene, and amino acids) helps hydrate and enhance elasticity, while peptides hydrate, plump, and refresh. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

raw_how_to_use:
• For best results, apply to fresh, clean, dry skin after you have cleansed.
  • Close your eyes and spritz liberally all-over dry skin.
  • Apply 2-3 times per week for a radiant glow.
  • Suitable for the face, neck and decolletage.

description:
A plumping gloss. 

Level up your lip looks with the plumping power of the Martine Cosmetics	 Hot Gloss. Formulated with sodium hyaluronate (a form of hyaluronic acid), this moisturising gloss uses a tingling sensation to plump the lips with guaranteed before and after results. Use it alone to awake your lips or as a topcoat over your fave lipstick. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

description:
A dewy finish tinted moisturiser.

Looking for a no-makeup makeup base with minimal effort? Then we’ve got you covered with the Revolution Superdewy Tinted Moisturiser. A hybrid between skincare and makeup, this tinted moisturiser has the perfect balmy texture with just a hint of tint to give you the ultimate natural base. The lightweight, hydration formula has a sheer coverage that works to blur out imperfections and redness. Infused with 68% water, this tinted moisturiser hydrates the skin whilst having a glossy, dewy finish that looks like your healthiest skin. 

-	Vegan
-	Cruelty-free

A dual-ended highlighter and contour stick. 

Add some shape to your face with the NYX Professional Makeup Wonder Stick Highlight & Contour Stick. Designed to help you define and brighten, this dual-ended highlighter and contour stick features a darker shade to sculpt and add dimension, and a lighter shade to enhance with a sunlit glow. description:
A creamy, matte lip liner.

Your lips deserve the best, so treat them to the about-face Matte Fix Lip Pencil. This creamy, matte lip liner glides onto the lips like butter, delivering nothing but bold and buildable colour for up to seven hours of wear. Enriched with a blend of vitamin C, E and moisturising hyaluronic acid, this pencil also helps to keep your lips feeling soft and smooth with every use.

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free

description:
A liquid concealer. 

If you’re not already a huge fan, let us introduce you to your next makeup hero. Maybelline’s Instant Anti Age Eraser Eye Concealer transforms the skin in a few quick and easy swipes thanks to the built-in, anti-microbial cushion tip. Packed with pigments, the concealer is perfect for covering imperfections around the delicate eye area. Infused with goji berry extract to help to reduce the appearance of dark circles, redness, fine lines, and blemishes for effortlessly smooth coverage.

"Meet Britain's #1 Concealer in value sales*
*2024 NielsenIQ, Value & Unit Sales, 52 w/e 13/07/2024"

- These are the best concealers, according to you – find out more __[here.]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/best-concealers/)__
- These are the iconic Maybelline products we can’t live without – find out more __[here.]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/best-maybelline-products/)__
- TikTok approved! See our review of Maybelline’s Instant Anti Age Eraser Eye Concealer __[here.](https://www.beautybay.com/edited/tiktok-maybelline-instant-anti-age-eraser-eye-concealer/)__

A pigmented plumping lip gloss.

Your lips deserve the best, so treat them to the plumping power of NYX Professional Makeup’s Duck Plump Lip Plumping Gloss. Designed to plump the lips for a full filler effect without the injection, this plumping lip gloss uses a spicy ginger-enriched formula to give your lips an instant and long-lasting plump. With a temporary tingling sensation, this plumping gloss glides on effortlessly to offer the lips high pigment payoff with a high-shine finish in a single swipe. Maximum, intense colour with minimal effort? Yes please. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

description:
A brightening concealer for tired eyes. 

Tired eyes, this is your final wakeup call. Revolution’s Eye Bright Concealer is here to help to brighten the undereye area, even after a late-night series binge. Formulated with vitamin C to give the skin a hot of brightening skincare, the concealers work to target under-eye circles with buildable coverage to suit your level of tiredness. The fluffy sponge applicator makes application easy, while the smooth, creamy formula blends seamlessly for a flawless finish. If blemishes and redness are your morning woes, use the concealer to create a flawless finish. 

- Cruelty free

how_to_use: After the last step of your skincare routine and before makeup, apply evenly at least 15 minutes before sun exposure. Blend well.Reapply at least every 2 hours.Can be worn without makeup for natural glow.
description:
An SPF 30 sunscreen and primer hybrid.

Protect and prime your skin with e.l.f Cosmetics’ Suntouchable! Whoa Glow SPF 30. Lightweight and hydrating, this hybrid sunscreen delivers SPF 30 sun protection and doubles as a primer for long-lasting makeup wear. Designed to give the skin a hint of radiance, this sunscreen uses an aloe, hyaluronic acid, and squalane-infused formula to nourish the skin for a glowing complexion that has a non-greasy feel.   

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free
- Suitable for oily, dry, and combination skin 
- Fragrance-free

A blurring foundation. 

Ditch the filters when you use the NYX Professional Makeup Bare With Me Blur Tint Foundation. Designed to deliver 12-hour hydration, this foundation uses a skin-loving blend of glycerin, matcha, and niacinamide to promote a visibly even, radiant, and healthy-looking complexion. Offering a hint of colour that blurs without dulling the skin, this foundation works to instantly smooth complexion with a matte finish and a lightweight feel.

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

raw_how_to_use: • Swipe over the lips using the applicator provided.
raw_description:
A pigmented lip gloss.

Introducing you to your latest must-have from Jeffree Star Cosmetics – the Supreme Gloss. This brand-new, non-sticky lip gloss formula is packed with pigment that delivers intense colour pay-off in just one swipe. Available in 39 shades with the delicious vanilla cupcake scent, you’re going to want to add them all to your haul.

  • Vegan
  • Cruelty-free
  • Non-sticky

description:
A texture reducing, blurring balm.

Make room in your base routine for the Danessa Myricks Beauty Yummy Skin Blurring Balm Powder. With a balm to powder formula that sets for a long-lasting, shine-free look, this texture reducing, coverage boosting, blurring balm helps to balance oils throughout the day while maintaining hydration. Powered by Swedish super ingredient, upsalite, this balm is your one-way ticket to a natural, clean glow.

raw_how_to_use:
To prime:

  • Using universal or a tinted shade, tap and blend with fingers to prime eyelids or complexion.

To highlight and contour:

  • Using a tinted shade at least two shades lighter or deeper than your skin tone, apply with fingers or a brush to brighten and sculpt.

To set foundation:

  • Using universal or a tinted shade, tap on with fingers or a dense brush to set complexion.

To add sheer coverage:

  • Using a tinted shade, press and roll in an even layer into textured or oily areas.

To set and add coverage:

  • Using a tinted shade, press & roll through the t-zone and tap to build additional coverage where needed.

Powered by Swedish super ingredient, upsalite, this balm is your one-way ticket to a natural, clean glow.

description:
A colour-shifting liquid eyeshadow. 

For eyeshadow looks that glisten beyond cosmic realms, you need the Glisten Cosmetics Chroma Magic. Combining light-reflecting particles with high-intensity pigments, this lightweight but buildable eyeshadow can be swiped onto the lid to achieve a multidimensional finish. Designed to add dazzling sparkle to any look, this liquid eyeshadow offers long-lasting, fall-out-free wear with a fast-drying formula. Race you to the checkout! 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

description:
A long-wear matte foundation. 

Ace your base with the MAC Cosmetics STUDIO FIX FLUID FOUNDATION. Lightweight but long-wearing, this foundation applies effortlessly to deliver natural-looking coverage with a soft-matte finish and a breathable feel. With a formula that’s 87% skincare ingredients like hyaluronic acid, this SPF 15 foundation hydrates the skin, strengthens and reinforces the skin barrier, and provides protection against UV rays and PA++ while controlling oil levels. Offering up to 24 hours of comfortable, crease-proof, and set-proof wear, this foundation can be built up to achieve your desired level of coverage, without clogging the pores, for either a natural tint or a full-glam look.

With a lightweight, long wearing formula, Revolution Conceal and Define Concealer effortlessly covers blemishes, counteracts dark circles and adds definition for a smooth, matte finish. Available in a range of 25 shades to precisely match to the undertones of the skin.

how_to_use: Apply directly to the lips.
description:
A smooth matte and satin lipstick. 

Gliding over the lips with a velvety smooth finish, each Anastasia Beverly Hills’ Matte & Satin Lipstick leaves nothing but a featherlight finish that lasts. The creamy, intense colours sit comfortably and evenly on the lips for long-lasting wearability that will give you something to pout about. The precise bullet shaped tip allows for control in defining the lip line and works to create effortlessly balanced application. Pick your fave shade and finish, or collect them all.

- Cruelty free

how_to_use: To create the best canvas for your color, we recommend lightening your hair using the GDY Lightening Kit.Product will stain, so protect hands, all surfaces and clothing.Apply shea butter, coconut oil or thick conditioner to the hairline to prevent staining.Mix color in the GDY Color Mixing Bowl and use gloves to prevent staining hands.Ensure you strand test first before applying color all over your head.Section and apply directly onto dry hair. Make sure color is fully saturated at every step by combining product through each section.Let the color sit for at least 30 minutes.Rinse with cold water and style as desired with GDY Prime.Allow at least 24 hours before your first shampoo.Rinse hair with cool water each time you wash to minimize fading process.Reduce hair washing days to extend color.

description:
A range of pastel semi-permanent hair colours.

Switch up your hair colour with the Semi Perm Lighter hair colours from Good Dye Young. With an ultra-creamy formula that deeply conditions while depositing super-sweet pastel colour, these semi-permanent hair dyes harness the power of a high-quality mask while colouring the hair, so your results feel and look good. Simply choose your favourite pastel shade (or mix n match) and get to work, your hair is going to love you.

- For best results, lighten hair before use
- Always perform a test strand to determine colour payoff
- Suitable for all hair types and textures
- Vegan
- Cruelty-free
- Free from paraben, ammonia, peroxide, bleach and phthalates
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearyl Alcohol, Peg 40 Castor Oil, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Octyldodecanol, Proplyene Glycol, Glycerin, Laureth 4, Laureth 23, Polyquaternium 6, Citris Bergamina (Bergamot Oil), Methlchlorisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Extract, Extrait D\u2019heliantus Annuus (Tournesol) May Also Contain: Basic Yellow 40, H C Blue 15, Basic Blue 99, Basic Orange 31, Basic Red 51, Basic Violet 16, Basic Violet 2, Basic Yellow 87, H C Blue 2, H C Red 1, H C Yellow 4."}]
raw_how_to_use:
• To create the best canvas for your color, we recommend lightening your hair using the GDY Lightening Kit.
  • Product will stain, so protect hands, all surfaces and clothing.
  • Apply shea butter, coconut oil or thick conditioner to the hairline to prevent staining.
  • Mix color in the GDY Color Mixing Bowl and use gloves to prevent staining hands.
  • Ensure you strand test first before applying color all over your head.
  • Section and apply directly onto dry hair. Make sure color is fully saturated at every step by combining product through each section.
  • Let the color sit for at least 30 minutes.

  • Rinse with cold water and style as desired with GDY Prime.

  • Allow at least 24 hours before your first shampoo.
  • Rinse hair with cool water each time you wash to minimize fading process.
  • Reduce hair washing days to extend color.

description:
18” clip-in remy hair extensions.

Extend your beauty with the Beauty Works 18” Deluxe Remy Instant Clip-in Hair Extensions. This ultimate DIY, three-piece extension system is easy to apply and allows you to change your hair length as often as you change your mind. Get ready for a good hair day, every day!

- 100% remy cuticle retained human hair
- Suitable for fine to medium hair types
- Lace weft structure 
- Ethically sourced and regulated hair
- Multi award-winning hair extensions
- Can be heated, styled, and washed like your own hair.

Pack Contains:
- Large piece - 2 x 11"
- Nape piece - 1 x 8"
ingredients: [{"ingredients": "100% Remy Cuticle Retained Human Hair"}]
raw_how_to_use:
• Apply Beauty Works extensions in the comfort of your own home, simply style clean, dry hair to blend into the wave pattern of the hair extensions.

  • Then, section off your own hair from your temples to your crown, insert each weft wherever necessary and secure them in place by snapping each clip tight to the root of your own hair.

  • Let down your hair over each weft and repeat throughout the hairline until you're fully satisfied with your new lengths.

description:
A high-shine lipstick. 

Enjoy the full-pigment luxury of Jeffree Star Cosmetics‘ Shiny Trap Lipstick. Comfortable and creamy, this high-shine lipstick effortlessly glides onto the lips to deliver a long-lasting pigment with a lightweight feel and filter-like finish. Designed to create a breathable barrier on the lips, this shiny lipstick’s lightweight formula is enriched with pomegranate flower extract and jojoba liquid wax to help nourish the lips and provide protection against environmental pollution. Haul for smooth and plump lips! 

- Cruelty-free
- Free of silicones, mineral oil, paraffin, and PEGs

description:

After that soft-focus, airbrushed complexion? Haul Makeup Revolution’s Skin Silk Serum Foundation. Formulated with hydrating hyaluronic acid and plumping peptides, this skincare-powered foundation helps blur imperfections with a weightless feel and a radiant, satin finish. Offering light-to-medium coverage, this breathable foundation applies effortlessly and can be built up for an undetectable, your-skin-but-better effect.

how_to_use: Wearing the gloves provided, gradually massage small amounts of gloss evenly onto clean, damp hair.Starting from the roots and avoiding the scalp, to prevent colour staining, work gloss through to ends of hair.Leave for 10 minutes on light hair and up to a maximum of 20 minutes on dark hair to achieve the desired colour result.Rinse well, until water runs clear. Dry and style hair as usual.For best results, use a quarter of a tube for short to medium hair and half a tube for long hair.
description:
A semi-permanent hair treatment gloss.

Colour as you condition with the Josh Wood Colour Gloss. Designed to help you refresh or switch up your hair colour as you nourish each strand, this treatment gloss is your one-way ticket for the ultimate rich, shiny finish. Lasting up to 6 weeks per treatment, this treatment contains nourishing shea butter and perilla oil, and it sounds like your kinda vibe. Good hair days are on their way…

- Tried, tested, and loved by the BEAUTY BAY staff – find out why __[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/staff-faves-july-2022/)__
- We’re obsessed with this colour-boosting treatment – find out why __[here]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/josh-wood-colour-hair-gloss-review/)__

raw_how_to_use:
• Wearing the gloves provided, gradually massage small amounts of gloss evenly onto clean, damp hair.
  • Starting from the roots and avoiding the scalp, to prevent colour staining, work gloss through to ends of hair.
  • Leave for 10 minutes on light hair and up to a maximum of 20 minutes on dark hair to achieve the desired colour result.
  • Rinse well, until water runs clear. Dry and style hair as usual.
  • For best results, use a quarter of a tube for short to medium hair and half a tube for long hair.

description:
A long-wear matte foundation. 

Ace your base with the MAC Cosmetics STUDIO FIX FLUID FOUNDATION. Lightweight but long-wearing, this foundation applies effortlessly to deliver natural-looking coverage with a soft-matte finish and a breathable feel. With a formula that’s 87% skincare ingredients like hyaluronic acid, this SPF 15 foundation hydrates the skin, strengthens and reinforces the skin barrier, and provides protection against UV rays and PA++ while controlling oil levels. Offering up to 24 hours of comfortable, crease-proof, and set-proof wear, this foundation can be built up to achieve your desired level of coverage, without clogging the pores, for either a natural tint or a full-glam look.

Shades 1 and 2:

  • To apply, use short, feathery strokes with an angled brush to outline, define, and fill in sparse areas, gradually building coverage as desired.

Shade 3:

  • This nourishing wax pomade can be worn alone to lock hair into place for long-wearing hold. For a more defined brow, layer each pomade over a complimentary powder to imbue the brow with subtle colour and create pigmented, buildable intensity for a sculpted look that stays all day.
raw_description:

Bringing you (and your brows) an array of finishes, this triple-threat trio features one rich balm consistency, plus two coordinating pressed powders to help groom and shape the brows with long-lasting hold and coverage. With a selection of shades to work well with all brow shades and complement skin tones, this versatile trio can be used to fill in the brows, enhance the hairline, or as eyeshadow.

how_to_use: Apply directly to lips.Use alone for a naturally tinted and moisturized lips or with a lip stick for shine.
description:
A glossy, lightly tinted lip balm. 

Put your lips onto the much-needed moisture they deserve with the Laneige Lip Glowy Balm. Bringing you the best of a balm and gloss, this 2-in-1 hybrid is blended with shea and murumuru butters to infuse the lips with intense nourishment. Mighty with moisture, this deliciously-scented balm combats chapped lips and dryness with lasting hydration and no icky, sticky feel. Another beauty bonus you didn’t know you need is that it coats the lips in comfort and a glossy and slightly tinted finish.  Pick your fave or collect them all. 

__*Meet Laneige*__

If you ask us “What’s in your bag?”, it’s  [Laneige](https://www.beautybay.com/l/laneige/). They’ve flooded our feeds (and shelves) with their collection of skin-quenching, barrier-boosting, hydrating formulas. Backed by 25 years of water science expertise, their products are the ultimate go-to for that glass skin glow. Viral for their ultra-sweet [Lip Sleeping Mask](https://www.beautybay.com/p/laneige/lip-sleeping-mask/) and [Lip Glowy Balm](https://www.beautybay.com/p/laneige/lip-glowy-balm/berry/), Laneige perfectly blends that feed-worthy aesthetic with effective skincare solutions.

description:
A matte eyeshadow pencil.

This is eyeshadow, but not as you know it. The Nudestix Magnetic Matte Eye Colour is a multi-tasking eyeshadow pencil that can be used to create so many looks. The 3-in-1 pencil can be used as an eyeshadow, eyelid primer, or eyeliner pencil, giving you everything you need to create perfect eye looks every time, in just one pencil. The long-lasting, creamy formula glides onto the lid for buildable colour that dries down to a matte finish. Available in a range of neutral colours, you’ll find a must-have for your makeup bag.

-	Black matte tin, sharpener, and cosmetic mirror included
-	Vegan
-	Paraben-free
-	Sulphate-free
