description:
A high-potency gel-like serum which visibly targets hyperpigmentation and dark spots.

Deter dark spots with The Ordinary's Alpha Arbutin 2% + HA. Formulated at a notably high-concentration and supported by a potent dose of hyaluronic acid (to efficiently deliver ingredients deep into skin), this serum works to reduce the appearance of marks, scars, hyperpigmentation, and age spots by inhibiting melanin production.

*   Alpha Arbutin - A safe skin-lightening ingredient which works by reducing melanin production.
*   Hyaluronic Acid - Attracts up to 1000 times its weight in water.
*   Beauty editor approved – find out why <u>__[here.]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/skincare-ingredients-to-brighten-skin/)__</u>
*   Find out more about alpha arbutin <u>__[here.]( https://www.beautybay.com/edited/what-is-alpha-arbutin/)__</u>

how_to_use: Apply the lipliner: Start from the cupid's bow: Begin by drawing a small 'X' at your cupid's bow (the centre of your upper lip). This mark will serve as a guideline for creating a symmetrical lip shape.Start outlining your lip shape. If you want to make your lips appear larger, you can slightly extend the line just outside your natural lip line.To improve your lipstick’s staying power, you can use the lip liner to fill in your lips entirely.Apply your favourite lipstick/lip gloss directly on top.Gently press your lips together to blend the lip liner and lipstick/lip gloss seamlessly.
description:
A long-wear lip liner.

Add fierce definition to your lips with the SOSU by Suzanne Jackson Longwear Lip Liner. Creamy and effortlessly blendable, this long-lasting lip liner smoothly glides along the lips for a bold and precise lip look. This lip liner’s smudge-proof formula offers a lightweight feel and fills and smooths fine lines without fading or feathering to lock in long-lasting colour. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

raw_how_to_use:
• Apply the lipliner: Start from the cupid's bow: Begin by drawing a small 'X' at your cupid's bow (the centre of your upper lip). This mark will serve as a guideline for creating a symmetrical lip shape.
  • Start outlining your lip shape. If you want to make your lips appear larger, you can slightly extend the line just outside your natural lip line.
  • To improve your lipstick’s staying power, you can use the lip liner to fill in your lips entirely.
  • Apply your favourite lipstick/lip gloss directly on top.
  • Gently press your lips together to blend the lip liner and lipstick/lip gloss seamlessly.

description:
Sculpt, define, and glow with our __velvety, buildable, blendable__ liquid bronzer.

Bronze your way to __radiant__, __sun-kissed skin__ with the By BEAUTY BAY Liquid Cream Bronze. Formulated with microsphere powders to create a __soft-focus effect__, this __ultra-pigmented__ bronzer glides seamlessly onto the skin for buildable, blendable warmth that’s as subtle or dramatic as you like. The __lightweight__, __creamy__ __formula__ gives skin a __smooth__, __satin__ __finish__, while an infusion of __jojoba__ and __sweet__ __almond__ __oils__ work to __nourish__ and __smooth__ the complexion. Each versatile shade can be used on the cheeks, eyes, and anywhere you’d like to add a boost of bronze. Sunshine, bottled.  

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free
- Complete your glowy beat with our [By BEAUTY BAY Liquid Cream Blush](https://www.beautybay.com/p/beauty-bay/liquid-cream-blush/) and [Liquid Cream Highlighter](https://www.beautybay.com/p/beauty-bay/liquid-cream-highlighter/)

*__Looking for your By BEAUTY BAY Powder Bronze match?__*

If you're shade [Fawn](https://www.beautybay.com/p/beauty-bay/powder-bronzer/fawn/), try Liquid Cream Bronze in Fudge.

Usually shade [Beach](https://www.beautybay.com/p/beauty-bay/powder-bronzer/beach/)? Try Liquid Cream Bronze in Butterscotch.

For shade [Caramel](https://www.beautybay.com/p/beauty-bay/powder-bronzer/caramel/), try Liquid Cream Bronze in Walnut.

And if you're shade [Chestnut](https://www.beautybay.com/p/beauty-bay/powder-bronzer/chestnut/), try Liquid Cream Bronze in Cacao.

Want to buy both together? Shop our perfect match [Powder Bronze and Liquid Cream Bronze duos](https://www.beautybay.com/p/beauty-bay/bronze-bff-duo/fawn-and-fudge/).

Formulated with microsphere powders to create a soft-focus effect, this ultra-pigmented bronzer glides seamlessly onto the skin for buildable, blendable warmth that’s as subtle or dramatic as you like. The lightweight, creamy formula gives skin a smooth, satin finish, while an infusion of jojoba and sweet almond oils work to nourish and smooth the complexion. Each versatile shade can be used on the cheeks, eyes, and anywhere you’d like to add a boost of bronze. Sunshine, bottled.

  • Vegan
  • Cruelty-free
  • Complete your glowy beat with our By BEAUTY BAY Liquid Cream Blush and Liquid Cream Highlighter

Looking for your By BEAUTY BAY Powder Bronze match?

If you're shade Fawn, try Liquid Cream Bronze in Fudge.

Usually shade Beach? Try Liquid Cream Bronze in Butterscotch.

For shade Caramel, try Liquid Cream Bronze in Walnut.

And if you're shade Chestnut, try Liquid Cream Bronze in Cacao.

Want to buy both together? Shop our perfect match Powder Bronze and Liquid Cream Bronze duos.

A buildable gel colour for brow tinting. 

For brows that speak volumes, you need the Anastasia Beverly Hills Volumizing Tinted Brow Gel. __Lightweight and buildable__, this brow-boosting gel features a smooth and mousse-like formula that transforms the brows by tinting and adding volume with a __natural, long-wearing finish__ for up to 24 hours. With a precision brush to coat hairs, this brow gel can be brushed through the brows to coat each hair for natural fullness and definition in a few seconds.  

Cruelty-free

description:
A 24-hour longwearing multi-use concealer with a brush applicator.

Ready for quick, easy concealer coverage? Introducing the Urban Decay Stay Naked Quickie Concealer. Infused with vitamin E for long-lasting skin hydration, this lightweight multi-use concealer with a brush applicator covers acne, dark circles, under eyes, and hyperpigmentation for up to 24 hours with a natural finish, allowing for fast, finger-free application that’s suitable for targeted or all-over usage. A must-have for the makeup obsessives!

- Vegan 
- Cruelty free
- Up to 24-hour longwearing
- Waterproof
- Humidity resistant
- Transfer resistant
- Non-comedogenic

breadcrumbs: [{"name": "Makeup", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/makeup/"}, {"name": "NYX Professional Makeup", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/nyxprofessionalmakeup/"}, {"name": "Lipgloss", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/l/nyxprofessionalmakeup/lipgloss/"}, {"name": "Duck Plump Lip Plumping Gloss", "url": "https://www.beautybay.com/p/nyx-professional-makeup/duck-plump-lip-plumping-gloss/"}]
description:
A pigmented plumping lip gloss.

Your lips deserve the best, so treat them to the plumping power of NYX Professional Makeup’s Duck Plump Lip Plumping Gloss. Designed to plump the lips for a full filler effect without the injection, this plumping lip gloss uses a spicy ginger-enriched formula to give your lips an instant and long-lasting plump. With a temporary tingling sensation, this plumping gloss glides on effortlessly to offer the lips high pigment payoff with a high-shine finish in a single swipe. Maximum, intense colour with minimal effort? Yes please. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

description:
A texture reducing, blurring balm.

Make room in your base routine for the Danessa Myricks Beauty Yummy Skin Blurring Balm Powder. With a balm to powder formula that sets for a long-lasting, shine-free look, this texture reducing, coverage boosting, blurring balm helps to balance oils throughout the day while maintaining hydration. Powered by Swedish super ingredient, upsalite, this balm is your one-way ticket to a natural, clean glow.

raw_how_to_use:
To prime:

  • Using universal or a tinted shade, tap and blend with fingers to prime eyelids or complexion.

To highlight and contour:

  • Using a tinted shade at least two shades lighter or deeper than your skin tone, apply with fingers or a brush to brighten and sculpt.

To set foundation:

  • Using universal or a tinted shade, tap on with fingers or a dense brush to set complexion.

To add sheer coverage:

  • Using a tinted shade, press and roll in an even layer into textured or oily areas.

To set and add coverage:

  • Using a tinted shade, press & roll through the t-zone and tap to build additional coverage where needed.

Powered by Swedish super ingredient, upsalite, this balm is your one-way ticket to a natural, clean glow.

description:
A 14-sachet supply of cherry-flavoured collagen gels. 

Support your hair, nails, and skin from within by hauling the Feel Pro Collagen Gels. Formulated with VeCollal® (a vegan alternative to collagen) to transform the skin, this fast-absorbing supplement uses a vegan formula to enrich the skin with pro-youth benefits, enhance elasticity, and support hair and nail growth. Clinically shown to double collagen production just after 2 days, this antioxidant-rich collagen features an infusion of gotu kola, vitamin C, calcium, and Panax ginseng to plump and smooth the skin, even out skin pigmentation, and boost skin hydration. Perfect for reducing wrinkles and fine lines, this delicious cherry-flavoured supplement belongs in your daily routine.

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free and PETA-approved
- Free of gluten and allergens

how_to_use: For best results apply to medium to light blonde hair.Colour results will vary depending on the base colour and condition of the hair.Apply to clean, dry or towel-dried hair.Leave on for 20 minutes, the longer the time the more vibrant the colour.Rinse thoroughly with cool to lukewarm water.Dry, style hair as desired and have a happy hair day.Colour will fade with washing.
description:
A semi-permanent hair colour.

Transform your locks with the Sophie Hannah Hair Semi-Permanent Hair Colour. It'll leave your hair feeling silky soft, looking bright and smelling great, thanks to the 2-in-1 hair colour and mask formula. Packed full of hair-loving ingredients like vitamin B5 to provide long lasting moisture and strength, coconut oil to smooth the hairs cuticle and enhance colour, rice proteins to improve manageability plus hydrolysed quinoa to preserve and retain your bright colour, it’s time to pick your fave shade.

- Vegan
- Cruelty-free
- For best results apply to medium to light blonde hair. 
- Each bottle, cap and carton is 100% recyclable
- Each bottle is developed using an oxo-biodegradable technology that accelerates plastic degradation without harming the environment

raw_how_to_use:
• For best results apply to medium to light blonde hair.

  • Colour results will vary depending on the base colour and condition of the hair.

  • Apply to clean, dry or towel-dried hair.
  • Leave on for 20 minutes, the longer the time the more vibrant the colour.
  • Rinse thoroughly with cool to lukewarm water.
  • Dry, style hair as desired and have a happy hair day.
  • Colour will fade with washing.

how_to_use: For the last step of morning and evening skin care routine, rub 2-3 drops of the oil on the palm of your hand and gently spread it out according to the skin texture, and then press gently to absorb it.Mixing nutritional cream and essence will provide excellent moisturizing and soothing effects.
description:
A lightweight, nourishing oil.

Skin in need of nourishment? The Black Rice Facial Oil from haruharu wonder has you covered. Infused with antioxidant-rich fermented black rice, this serum protects against free radicals, ultraviolet radiation, and pollution, while encouraging new cell growth. These benefits are further enhanced by a blend of jojoba, sweet almond, sunflower seed, and lavender oil to defend the skin, boost elasticity, and soothe irritation. Working wonders on all skin types, this do-it-oil is your secret to healthy, glowing skin.

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free

description:
A cream bronzer.

Secure sunkissed skin any day of the year whenever you use the Trixie Cosmetics Stix Cream Bronzer. Lightweight but rich in pigment, this buildable bronzer can be used to add sunny dimension and depth for a warm skin-like finish. Combining mango seed butter with plum seed oil and apricot kernel oil, this vitamin-rich cream bronzer softens, soothes, and nourishes the skin while leaving behind a sun-kissed glow. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Free of gluten and parabens

description:
A matte, medium to full coverage foundation.

For a 24-hour, natural, matte finish, you need the iconic Estee Lauder Double Wear Stay in Place Foundation SPF 10. Available in a huge range of shades, to suit all skin tones, this liquid foundation buffs and blends into the skin for a water and sweat proof matte finish that lasts up to 24 hours (minus the creasing, caking and streaking). The liquid formula is perfect for evening skin tone and covering imperfections, with a buildable but super lightweight feel on the skin, that helps to keep oil production at bay. Pick your shade and add it to your haul ASAP.

- Oil-free
- Non-comedogenic
- Waterproof
- Dermatologist tested
- Synthetic fragrance and gluten free

description:
A treatment gel for blemish-prone skin.  

Target and treat breakouts with the Clinique Anti-Blemish Solutions Clinical Clearing Gel. This targeted treatment gel has been developed to help treat spots quickly and effectively. Formulated with spot-busting salicylic acid, this gel works to clear away dead skin cells and bacteria that can lead to clogged pores and blemishes. The addition of laminaria sacharina extract helps to control oil production, whilst witch hazel tightens pores.

how_to_use: Apply on lips as is or on top of a lipstick or lip pencil.Dab on cheekbones, collar bones or just below the brow for that dewy highlighting effect.To achieve an even more plumped lips look, apply Plush on the middle part of your lip while keeping the rest of the lip in a matte finish.For a plumpy ombre effect, apply your lipstick or lip pencil and follow up with Plush in one or two shades lighter than your lipstick or lip pencil, on the middle part of your lip.Apply frequently to prevent sunburn and premature ageing.
description:
A shimmery, tinted lip gloss.

Swipe on shimmer with the LH Cosmetics Plush. Creamy and lightweight, this luminous gloss glides on to coat the lips with a sheer tint, a cushiony feel, and a delightful vanilla scent. An infusion of shimmering pigments delivers an illusion of plumper-looking lips and allows this versatile formula to double as a highlighter. A hydrating fusion of hyaluronic acid and vitamin E keeps the lips super nourished and protected, while SPF 15 provides a defence against sun damage. Thanks to its practical design and soft, plush applicator, this lip gloss will become your fave travel companion for effortless top-ups wherever you are.

raw_how_to_use:
• Apply on lips as is or on top of a lipstick or lip pencil.
  • Dab on cheekbones, collar bones or just below the brow for that dewy highlighting effect.
  • To achieve an even more plumped lips look, apply Plush on the middle part of your lip while keeping the rest of the lip in a matte finish.
  • For a plumpy ombre effect, apply your lipstick or lip pencil and follow up with Plush in one or two shades lighter than your lipstick or lip pencil, on the middle part of your lip.
  • Apply frequently to prevent sunburn and premature ageing.

how_to_use: Apply to lips as often as needed to moisturize and plump lips.
description:
A liquid lip balm. 

Lock your lips into the plumping nourishment of the Jeffree Star Cosmetics Liquid Lip Balm. Combining a propriety blend of plant extracts with a natural peptide, this restorative lip balm helps soothe, smooth, and moisturise the lips. An infusion of hyaluronic spheres helps plump the lips and work to minimise the look of fine lines and wrinkles, while hydrating cupuacu seed butter and vitamin-rich olive fruit oil help nourish the lips and provide antioxidant protection. 

- Vegan 
- Cruelty-free 
- Free of PEG, parabens, D5, silicone, talc, and sulphates

A liquid lip balm.

Lock your lips into the plumping nourishment of the Jeffree Star Cosmetics Liquid Lip Balm. Combining a propriety blend of plant extracts with a natural peptide, this restorative lip balm helps soothe, smooth, and moisturise the lips. An infusion of hyaluronic spheres helps plump the lips and work to minimise the look of fine lines and wrinkles, while hydrating cupuacu seed butter and vitamin-rich olive fruit oil help nourish the lips and provide antioxidant protection.

  • Vegan
  • Cruelty-free
  • Free of PEG, parabens, D5, silicone, talc, and sulphates

how_to_use: Use with every wash.After shampooing, apply a generous amount from scalp to tip.Massage into hair for one minute, then rinse.
description:
A travel-friendly smoothing conditioner. 

Tame those wandering strands with the KERASILK Smoothing Conditioner. Perfect for coarse and unruly hair, both biomimetic silk and shea oil make an appearance to help reduce frizz and make your mane more manageable. Leaving hair soft, smooth, and sleek from root to tip by deeply conditioning and nourishing, you’ll notice your hair become calmer and easier to detangle. It also features a floral and amber scent for an added treat.

- Vegan 
- Free of silicon, sulphates, dyes, microplastics, and mineral oils

description:
A long-wear matte foundation. 

Ace your base with the MAC Cosmetics STUDIO FIX FLUID FOUNDATION. Lightweight but long-wearing, this foundation applies effortlessly to deliver natural-looking coverage with a soft-matte finish and a breathable feel. With a formula that’s 87% skincare ingredients like hyaluronic acid, this SPF 15 foundation hydrates the skin, strengthens and reinforces the skin barrier, and provides protection against UV rays and PA++ while controlling oil levels. Offering up to 24 hours of comfortable, crease-proof, and set-proof wear, this foundation can be built up to achieve your desired level of coverage, without clogging the pores, for either a natural tint or a full-glam look.
